reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 3, 2026
reviews.title: Great ear buds !
reviews.body: I am not a paid reviewer. These things work great. I have a Motorola edge phone and these ear buds connected immediately. Didn't have to do anything! Just hit the pair button. There isn't any paper work so I'm trying to figure out the buttons on the ears bud still but the sound quality is great. Definitely noise cancelling without a problem. And they're comfy. They don't hurt my ears at all. I got the olive green paid and I love the color. Beautiful. Definitely worth what i paid.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on November 24, 2024
reviews.title: Great but they hurt
reviews.body: See Update at end, no more pain: Almost all reviews have no problem with the fit of these earbuds, but for me, they hurt. Not unbearably so, but it would be nice to not feel any discomfort at all. I tried changing the tips, adjusting the angle in my ear and also tried leaving loosely outside of ear canal, but always have noticeable discomfort. Plus if I leave them loose, I lose sound quality, so I don't like doing that. Would like to take away two stars but only removing one because these are really good earbuds otherwise for the price. I have never run out of power. Usually when I recharge the case, it doesn't even need recharging. I just do it to go back up to 100%. Despite the fact that I can feel them, it's not excruciating pain, so I do use them often. I just have to keep playing around with other tips and other means of making them more comfortable for me. The case is very attractive. In fact, someone saw my case with buds and commented, "Wow, those are nice!" I don't mind the size. I think it might be the reason the charge lasts so long. If you cut a deck of cards in half and placed on top of each other, that's about the size of the case. The earbuds themselves are attractive but also bulky. Maybe all earhook buds are bulky, I don' t know as these are my first. I wish they had skintone colors to make them less noticeable. I ordered rose gold thinking they would be less noticeable, but should've just gone with black. The sound quality, to me, is exceptional. I use for listening to music, to lessons, and have used for TV. I have not used for phone calls because I rarely use these thru my phone. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 20, 2026
reviews.title: Fantastic buds!
reviews.body: These are some of the best budget earbuds I have ever used. They are very comfortable, my ears are often sensitive to ear buds but these are not painful. The sound quality is exceptional, fantastic bass, and listening to music is excellent. But perhaps the best feature is the battery life, I have to charge the holder maybe once a week, and I use these earbuds at least 6 hours a day. They do not feel cheap, and Ive dropped this while biking and theres zero damage to my case.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 18, 2026
reviews.title: Good product for the price
reviews.body: Going on a year and a half of having these. Bought them for my daughter to use while she’s at the gym. They stay charged for days before she has to fully recharge them again. The sound is good, treble could be better (it’s a bit muffled) but the baas is great. They’re comfortable to wear, and they don’t slip off while she works out/jogs. Over all, a good product for a reasonable price.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2026
reviews.title: Pleasantly Surprised
reviews.body: These were delivered on 03/27. Today on 04/08 is the first time I've needed to charge the case. I've used these everyday and all day at work since delivery. They have lasted the entire day without fail. This is my first pair and will purchase another. The only feature I am missing is ambient sound but the long lasting battery life is worth the trade. I hope the battery life doesn't degrade. I don't generally like hooked headphones but these are comfortable. I changed the earpiece to a smaller bud that came in the box. The fit is pretty snug and secure. You could workout in these no problem. The sound is pretty good as well. The bass is surprisingly deep and voices have lots of clarity.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 3, 2026
reviews.title: Good buy
reviews.body: Awesome. I wanted to use these for a bit, prior to this review. I bought 2 pairs 1 for me and another for my spouse. They hold a charge as advertised. 3 days of wear with no issues. Love that you get different sized “buds” for your ears. My spouse wears at work, 12 hour night in a loud environment-people yakking, hammering, sanding. He has no complaints about how they feel and can still hear if someone calls him but the background noise is tolerable. I also do not have issues with wearing them. Sound is good and I listen to a lot of audiobooks with no issues. Connecting to device is a breeze. The buttons and led light for battery is as said. I’m Great value for the cost. Would buy from this company again.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 11, 2026
reviews.title: Very happy
reviews.body: First of all the battery life is awesome. Second well there are options out there. They have better sound like the Apple earbuds. These stay in your ear when you’re at the gym or doing homework or cleaning your house or anything. I can’t tell you how many times I’ve almost lost those dam apple pods. And these cost way less. Good product.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 24, 2026
reviews.title: They're wireless over the ear headphones at a decent price
reviews.body: I end up losing or breaking a lot of headphones for one reason or another. So instead of getting a pari of Airpods or whatever stupid Google headphones they have, I just get pairs like this and when it either breaks or I lose one I just get another. I also keep even cheaper pairs in my car and at my job. I mean what is there to say about these? They're not BOSE quality but the audio is fine to me. They go over the ear which is my favorite style of these kinds of earbuds as they're the least likely to fall off or get lost as a result, and if they get caught on something you FEEL IT. Also: THESE HAVE AN ACTUAL BUTTON ON THEM? I had a pair before that tried to use a "touch" button on it aka not a button but like a touch screen on a 1 inch earbud? It might have been the worst design choice I've ever seen in my life. It would say tap to pause hold to skip hold LONGER to change volume hold 0.1 seconds less long for Google Assistant, and now for the OTHER ONE...no thank you. Give me REAL PHYSICAL BUTTONS LIKE THIS ONE. The reason they're not 5 stars is every single pair of headphones like these I have had? Eventually they stop charging. Eventually the metal charging contact points either no longer make contact or just stop being able to transmit any power. That's actually how at least 2 pairs of headphones died on me. Most are me losing just 1 headphone though. Read more Read more

reviews.title: Très agréable à porter
reviews.body: Je les ai offert à mon épouse qui a de petite oreille elle les trouvent très agréables à porter le son est de très bonne qualité le réducteur de bruit réduit bien le bruit embiant elle en est très satisfaite. Dommage qu il n existe au jour de la rédaction de mon avis quand rose sinon j en aurais acheter une paire pour moi aussi

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 28, 2024
reviews.title: Great value earbuds
reviews.body: So far so good, after 4 days owning these i find them very good and tick all the boxes i wanted: - Physical button that is easy to press when walking or running to control music/calls/volume - Secure fit on the ear when running - Great battery life, case is still at 90% + after using for days on & off - Great sound, do not have to put up to max volume when walking beside traffic to be able to hear your podcast or music - Using one earbud only works perfectly, no breaks in sound - Connects automatically on taking out of box and disconnects when putting back in the box - my previous pairs were inconsistent on this - not disconnecting blue-tooth hours after putting back in box. All in all, very happy with these budget value earbuds

name: JBL Vibe Beam 2 - True Wireless Noise Cancelling Earbuds with JBL Pure Bass Sound & Smart Ambient technology, 4mics for crisp, clear calls, up to 40Hrs of Playback, IP54 Dust & Water resistant (Black)
description: Quality sound just got easier—and more fun. JBL Vibe Beam 2 earbuds feature exciting JBL Pure Bass Sound, plus Active Noise Cancelling and Smart Ambient technology so you decide how much of the outside world you want to hear. Manage hands-free crisp, clear calls with just a tap on the earbuds. Use the JBL Headphones app to customize your sound and Voice Prompts language. Connect seamlessly with up to 8 Bluetooth® devices and switch effortlessly from one to another. And with up to 40 hours* of playback time, they’re a great everyday sound companion. (*with ANC off)
highlights: JBL Pure Bass sound: JBL Vibe Beam 2 earbuds feature 8mm dynamic drivers that deliver exciting JBL Pure Bass sound.

Active Noise Cancelling:Listen to your surroundings & filter out distracting noise. Smart Ambient lets you control how much of the outside world you want to hear, so you can talk with others or stay aware of your surroundings while keeping your earbuds in

4 mics for crisp, clear calls: Two mics on each earbud pick up and clearly transmit your voice while canceling out ambient noise. So you can make clear, crisp calls even when you're walking through a busy park on a breezy day.

40 total hours of playback: Enjoy 10 hours of playtime, plus another three full charges (30Hrs) in the charging case.* Need to recharge even faster? 10 minutes on a USB type-C charging cable will give you another three hours of playtime. (*with ANC off)

JBL Headphones app: Select the EQ that fits your style or customize your own. Voice Prompts in multiple languages give you useful information (e.g.if battery is running low). Or chill out and recharge in Relax Mode by choosing one of five peaceful sounds.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2026
reviews.title: Sounds and work amazing, a bit loose sometimes though
reviews.body: Very comfortable and very convenient while looking nice. It's extremely light and sound amazing! The ambient is very nice I can hear everything even with both earbuds in, while the noise cancelling does a shockingly good job at stopping any noise just like my headphones. Only complaint is even after changing the tips that they come with to my size sometimes they feel loose and going to fall but overall very nice and can still fit on my commute.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2026
reviews.title: Good for "budget" buds.
reviews.body: Let me start with the caveat 'For the Price'...These are good and the noise cancelling is good enough. The sound quality is very adequate, BUT compared to my $200+ buds, they fall a bit short. They are lacking in base despite their title and sound somewhat tinny even tho I've messed with the equalizer. Also the touch controls are not ideally positioned. No issue with battery life so far.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 25, 2026
reviews.title: Pleasantly surprised :)
reviews.body: I got mine today and nothing is wrong with it, works exactly as described. I love that you can control almost everything about the sound, using the JBL headphones app. You can fully customize the equalizer settings to get the sound you like. Maybe I’m just used to using cheaper earbuds, but these are the best pair I’ve ever used. There is one feature in particular that I find extremely useful— The ambient and talk-through modes allow you to hear EVERYTHING around you, in real time, with no delay. It amplifies the sounds around you, including your own voice, without being annoying or disorienting. It balances those sounds with any media/music you play. Both can be heard clearly- you don’t need to take out an earbud to hear your surroundings, while still getting an immersive audio experience. On the other hand, the noise-cancelling function works better than other earbuds I’ve used. It is VERY quiet in this mode, perfect for when you DONT want to hear everything around you. It’s easy and quick to switch between these modes. You can use the app to switch it instead of touching the earbud itself, if you’d like. But out-of-the-box, it is a touch control function. There are many other features but the ones I’ve just described are my favorites. GET IT ON SALE THO DONT SPEND A FORTUNE ON THESE… I’ve seen other people saying it wasn’t worth that much. But I am happy after getting these for $39. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 25, 2025
reviews.title: Honest Review (Pretty Good).
reviews.body: [Pros] • The buds have really good sound quality and the ambient aware mode is as having on hearing aids! • The battery life is awesome and lasted an entire night before I needed to charge it again! The case, even longer. It was about to last a day and a half had I not charged it. • There are charging indicators for both the buds and the headphones. • Has many features with the app and allows ambient noises, noise cancelling, and eq editing. • Connects really well and fast. There were no issues at all with connecting the buds to my phone each time I tried. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 21, 2026
reviews.title: BUY THEM!
reviews.body: These JBL earbuds are amazing. Especially for the price! The sound is great (comparable to my Apple Airpods). Has a good bass sound and not a bunch of treble as some have. They are pretty balanced. There is also an app to download for control. The battery lasts a very long time. Battery lasts way longer than my Apple Airpods. These JBL's also connect to multiple items. For example, when I'm at work I have them connected to my work phone and my cell phone. When I'm talking on my cell and my work phone rings, it puts my cell call on hold. I have JBL boombox and a small JBL speaker. They all are capable of connecting to each other. These earbuds are light weight and durable. I seriously can't say anything bad about JBL products. I guess the only thing that is annoying is how the JBL earbuds go into the case backwards in comparison to Airpods and I wish they charged on my magnet base charger. These have to be plugged in but that's really no big deal.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 26, 2026
reviews.title: Love them.
reviews.body: These are actually really good for the price. They really are noise canceling and held a charge for a while. I thought I lost them, and so I bought another pair. Of course I found them again so now I have two pairs. Call quality is good and they seem to charge quick. I don't know about the water resistance as I didn't drop them in water or anything.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 9, 2026
reviews.title: Good noise-canceling, but don't buy into the hype (product inconsistency)
reviews.body: Overall, this is a good value for your money if you don't need the microphone. Full disclosure—I ordered a replacement for my original pair of earbuds because the microphone quality was not as advertised. The replacement earbuds showed a vast improvement in mic quality, but it was evident that the earbuds were not new, and came with physical imperfections. I was not impressed. I paid full price for a NEW set of earbuds, not a product that had likely been returned. Even still, the microphone quality isn’t what I was looking for, as I had intended to use them for business calls. This is my first experience with JBL, and I can’t say that I’ll be trying any of their other products soon. However, if you need a pair of earbuds with strong bass and decent battery life, these are a good temporary option. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 8, 2026
reviews.title: Nice buds but slow delivery
reviews.body: These replaced a pair of JBL Endurance Race TWS that lasted for a year and on month. One of buds started to give static or not work at times so I had to replace. This vendor said he could have a new pair of JBL Vibe Beam 2s delivered on one day be he did not. It took two days and I was disappointed. Had I known, I would have waited a little longer from another vendor for at least $10 less. As it turns out, these are fine for working out. I was worried they would not be, but they are. Kettlebell swings, elliptical machine, weights, and such and these stay in the ear fine. I had to use the larger ear plug attachments and it improved the listening experience. I have never used iPhone ear pods so i can't give you a comparison, but these are fine for working out at the gym. The only other uses I have for ear buds is at the car wash and for meditating at home. They really improve the meditation experience -- find meditation music on your smart phone or computer, connect to the ear buds and enjoy a great meditation experience. Thanks for reading!

reviews.body: Ces écouteurs font vite ce qu’on attend d’eux : ils chargent rapidement, offrent une autonomie durable et tiennent bien dans les oreilles. Le design est confortable et pratique pour tous les jours (travail, balades, vidéos). 🎧 Ce que j’ai remarqué Charge rapide et batterie qui tient bien la durée Construction solide, pas fragile du tout Son correct pour le prix, même si ce n’est pas du niveau “haut de gamme” audiophile 🔊 Il y a aussi ce que je pense être un mode transparence (ou réduction passive du bruit) qui laisse passer les sons de l’environnement lorsque tu n’écoutes rien — ce qui est pratique pour rester conscient de ce qui se passe autour. Je n’ai pas encore testé si ça fonctionne pareil avec de la musique, mais sans musique c’est notable. ✅ En résumé : Read more Read more

Equipped with an advanced chip, this remote provides precise Bluetooth voice control from up to 40 inches away. Effortlessly search, launch, and pause content from any angle, enhancing your home entertainment experience.

【2-Year Full Warranty】All purchases are covered by a two-year warranty. With over 30 years of experience, we are committed to providing high-quality, affordable remote controls to millions of American households. If you need support, go to Your Orders → View Order Details → Ask Product Question.

【Pairing Instructions】Slide the back cover to open the battery compartment. Insert two AAA batteries and turn on your TV. Press and hold the Back/Exit and Play/Pause buttons simultaneously for 5–7 seconds until you see “Pairing complete” on your TV screen. If pairing fails, repeat the process a few times until successful.

【Durable & Reliable】This remote is crafted from sustainable ABS materials, making it safe and easy to use for all age groups. Each button is tested to withstand over 100,000 clicks or approximately 9 years of normal use.

reviews.title: Not bad, but not a five star product.
reviews.body: I purchased it as a replacement for the LG TV remote that I had for 2 years. I purchased other products that didn’t work including a two pack from Amazon which only one of the two remotes worked and eventually quit functioning within 12 months. On first use it was very easy to set up. Instant connection from the time that I put the batteries in. Voice controls did not work. I attempted the instructions both on the remote and Amazon, and these did not work. Neither do the Disney+, Alexa, or LG channel buttons however the Netflix and Prime Video buttons both work. The function as a magic remote was not worth the extra dollars. We will have to see if it lives longer than its predecessor. There are no instructions on how to set up the multicolored other Functional buttons, and therefore are essentially useless. Overall, the instant connectivity and thus minimal setup make it an excellent replacement remote. I’m not sure that at double the cost of others that it is a worthwhile price for the nonfunctioning magic, remote and 4 of 10 nonfunctioning quick buttons.

description: The Kodak PIXPRO FZ55 is a compact digital camera designed for simple everyday photography, offering an easy way to capture trips, family moments, or casual creative projects. It uses a sixteen MP CMOS sensor and a five times optical zoom lens, with a twenty eight mm wide angle setting that helps frame landscapes and group photos. The camera records one thousand eighty p full HD video for short clips or basic vlogging, and the two point seven inch LCD screen makes it easy to review images and adjust settings. A rechargeable li-ion battery supports use throughout the day, and the camera accepts class ten SD, SDHC, or SDXC memory cards up to five hundred twelve GB. The slim, lightweight body fits comfortably in a pocket or small bag for quick access on the go. With straightforward controls and familiar menus, the FZ55 provides a practical option for users who want a simple point and shoot camera without added complexity.
highlights: Sixteen Megapixel Sensor: Captures detailed photos with a sixteen MP CMOS sensor for everyday shooting
Optical Zoom: Five times optical zoom with a twenty eight mm wide angle lens for flexible framing indoors or outdoors
Full HD Video: Records one thousand eighty p full HD video for travel clips, family moments, or simple vlogging

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 13, 2026
reviews.title: Good Bulk Buy, but Not for All-Day Sitting or Active Jobs
reviews.body: I originally bought this 12-pack for my husband back in 2023 because the bulk price was hard to beat. For the first few months, they were a great budget-friendly staple, but after nearly two years of use, we’ve seen where they start to fall short. Durability & Wearability: Initially, these were soft and comfortable for daily wear. However, after several months of regular washing, the black color began to fade significantly, and the fabric started to lose its "new" feel. Waistband & Sturdiness: The waistband starts out firm, but over time, it loses its elasticity. It doesn't have the long-term sturdiness needed to keep its shape, which leads to the dreaded "rollability" issue—the waistband eventually starts to curl and roll down during movement. Support & "The Bunch": My husband is a heavy equipment operator, so he spends his day sitting and moving in a cab. After the first few months, the support just wasn't there anymore. He found that the legs would roll up and the fabric would bunch up uncomfortably while he was working. Absorbency: They are 100% cotton, so they are naturally absorbent and breathable, which is a plus for moisture-wicking. However, once the fit becomes loose and "baggy," that benefit is outweighed by the lack of support. Read more Read more

Comfortable fit but not what is advertised at all. For the "cooling" bra the fabric is not as displayed and the straps are completely different. There seems to be A LOT of inconsistency with these bras. I ordered two black, this cooling one and a skin tone. Only the black ones are exactly alike and are the only ones of the four that have hooks to adjust the strap from basic over the shoulder to crossing across your back. None of them seem to have stitching to hold the individual hook and eye clasps in place and the skintone one has no stitching even on the entire panel covering the hook and eye section.

name: Crocs Unisex-Adult Classic Clog, Clogs for Women and Men
description: It’s the iconic clog that started a comfort revolution around the world. The irreverent go-to comfort shoe that you're sure to fall deeper in love with day after day. Crocs Classic Clogs offer lightweight Iconic Crocs Comfort. All Crocs shoes are uniquely designed and manufactured using our proprietary closed-cell resin, Croslite, a technology that gives each pair of shoes the soft, comfortable, lightweight and non-marking qualities that Crocs wearers know and love. Heat: do not expose your Crocs shoes to extreme heat or intense sunlight for an extended period of time. Due to the unique nature of the Crocs PCCR material, high temperatures may cause them to warp. Crocs shoes should solely be hand washed. If the model features a lining, it is recommended to put the lining in a mesh fabric or use a delicate cycle (of up to 30 °) if you machine wash. Cleaning your Crocs using the washing machine is at your own risk Looking for the ultimate warm-weather shoe? Crocs' Classic clog has a ventilated upper and a traction outsole to make it a top wet-dry performer--perfect for the beach--but we can think of a zillion other places you'll want to wear it.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 28, 2026
reviews.title: Nice enough product, but don't order your first pair online
reviews.body: The shoes themselves are comfortable, durable (so far), easy to clean, everything that you'd expect from the description. I went from a Crocs-hater to an appreciater. But don't order online until you're familiar with the sizing. The manufacturer doesn't offer half-sizes, Amazon recommends ordering a size down if you're in-between, and supposedly the shoes will stretch a bit with use... but in practice that did not work for us. If you have wide feet, or any issues with foot/toe swelling, it definitely makes sense to try the shoes on in-person first. Even wearing socks can make a big difference, because the rubber material is high-friction and doesn't allow "slipping in" easily. I eventually ended up with two pairs in different sizes, rotated seasonally based on weather (socks) and foot health. If you have a local sporting-goods chain beginning with "D" and rhyming with "Kicks", buy your first pair there, where you can try them on (and support the local employees)... then use Amazon for repeat purchases (since Amazon is currently about $15 cheaper). 5 stars for the product, 3 stars for ordering online.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2026
reviews.title: Best bra I’ve ever worn!
reviews.body: So, TMI. I am a 22 year breast cancer survivor that went through reconstructive surgery. After 22 years, the surgery has started to deteriorate. This means that I have one side that is a A cup and the other side is a C cup. It is almost impossible to find a bra or bathing suit that doesn’t make me look or feel like a freak. I do have a silicone inserts for the smaller cup size, but it is very uncomfortable and hot. This bra is absolutely amazing. Even without underwire it’s incredibly supportive. It does not roll up or ride up like many bras do without underwire. It fits perfectly and the bra straps are wide enough that they don’t keep slipping off of your shoulder. And best of all, I actually look normal when I wear a tighter shirt with it on. It is comfortable, soft, and frankly the best bra I have found so far. Even if you don’t have the challenges that I do finding a bra, I think that you would be very pleased with this. My only problem with it is it has three hooks in the back. I hate the three hooks! So I simply hook it on and loosen the straps and just put it over my head. The plastic piece to tighten the straps is actually towards the front so it’s very easy to adjust once you have it on. All in all it’s a perfect bra!

And the modest padding it provides in just the right way creates an attractive, natural-looking 'push up'. The material type, lower band width, and high-sided bra construction is perfectly designed to corral what it surrounds on my not-so-toned senior figure. Sorry no pictures. Just use your imagination to envision all the happy ways a great bra can make a woman look and feel. (BTW, I think tea red is one of the prettiest colors ever.)

reviews.title: Great for large busts & injured shoulders
reviews.body: Have been "well-endowed" for 34 years since having my first child. These are the first & only bras I've found that not only feel great, but look great and hold "the girls" in a non-matronly, non-uniboob. position. I've injured both shoulders and have a long upper torso, and many bras come with straps that aren't quite long enough for me, and that rest right over previously repaired parts of my shoulder, causing pain with minutes or hours from pressure. Good support is crucial, as the pull on upper chest muscles & ligaments from inadequately supported breasts also causes me discomfort & pain. I've tried every style & type of bra & strap out there - x back, convertibles, strapless, wired & wireless, front close, sports bras, you name the brand & stule, I've tried it. Plus all the "extras" - strap extenders & pads, tape & silicome "cutlets", etc. Nothing that felt even halfway tolerable worked and still looked good under clothing except heavily padded ports or wired bras with stiff, shaped cups that made my breasts look even larger, and reminded of women's magazine ads in the 1960's for hard, pointy-cup bras. And, when menopausal hot flashes or hot, humid weather hit, those few tolerable bras became soaked, leaving me with swamp boob, rashes & carrying a spare dry bra whenever I left home. Prepping for my 3rd shoulder surgery, I decided to search for a few inexpensive non-underwire bras with straps that could be unhooked or completely removed, for wearing while trussed up like a turkey for a few weeks post-op. Wired ones are quite uncomfortable and rub my underarm raw when my arm is strapped against my side & immobilized for 4-6 weeks, and I needed something supportive that wouldn't rub or pull on the operated areas, and to keep me "decent" during visits for PT & dr appts post op. I found these, read reviews, and gave them a try. I take a 38-42 DD, depending on brand & style, in Olga, Bali, Maidenform, Glamorise, etc., and 1 side, after 3 shoulder surgeries, is less full on top & sags a bit lower due to ligament damage, so it doesn't quite fill out a DD cup without help, and that shoulder slopes a bit. I usually need to play with straps & add a little lift in that cup so my chest looks even & that strap doesn't slide off. Going by the LetsJoli sizing chart, I decided to order the 2XL. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026
reviews.title: WOW, WOW, WOW!
reviews.body: WOW, this bra is so soft and comfortable. I'm not getting total support because I am old and sagging. I will just have to adjust the strap a little more I guess. However, this is the MOST COMFORTABLE SOFT BRA I have ever worn. I can wear it all day and never have the urge to rip it off like most other bras I have EVER worn. I really wish it would come in a FRONT CLOSURE because I find it very difficult to hook a bra as I am aging. I just hook it and spin it but would appreciate a front closure instead. This bra is perfect for camouflaging back fat. It doesn't strangle your underarms and doesn't cut into you back fat. I am 260 lbs, 5'6" and normally wear a 48-50 B or C cup depending on the bra. I just ordered the size using the size chart provided and it was perfect. UPDATE: I decided to try the smaller size, 4X to see if it made a difference with support. I was better for me and I got more support. They give you an extender so if you need more room for your back, that will help. I didn't need it. Such a nice bra. So happy I found this one. Just wish it came in FRONT CLOSURE because then it would be perfect.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026
reviews.title: New Favorite Everyday Bra!
reviews.body: I’ve purchased a different style of bra from this brand before and loved it, but it didn’t provide the full coverage shape I prefer. This one, however, checks all of my boxes. First off, the material has an incredibly soft, buttery feel. The wireless design is such a huge plus. I honestly wish bras like this had existed when I was younger instead of the stiff, unflattering “granny bras” I remember wearing as a teenager. The shape and lift this bra provides honestly exceeded my expectations. At my size, it’s usually difficult to find a bra that holds everything in place without making my chest look wider than my rib cage. Most bras that accomplish that tend to feel stiff and restrictive—almost like wearing armor. This one manages to give great support while still being comfortable. Read more Read more

reviews.title: BUY THIS BRA!!
reviews.body: FINALLY A BRA THAT DOESNT HURT ME OR MAKE ME CRAZY!! First of all, I hate bra shopping and everything related to it. I have to have an underwire but every single bra I've had, no matter the brand or how expensive it is, starts to eventually stab me from the underwire breaking through the fabric. I decided to try this LetsJoli bra after reading allll the reviews and after I tried a popular brand bra that had no underwire but it made my boobs look sooooo bad. The only thing I wish was different was more padding on the cup because my nips are aggressive when cold. 🫣 I never leave reviews but thought I would share because I'm soooo picky and we all need a comfortable bra that's not $60-100!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 17, 2026
reviews.title: Very good quality “cheap” undershirts
reviews.body: This is my first time buying Gilden undershirts. I’m 5’10”, 165lbs, 40” chest, 33” waist. I bought size medium and the fit is perfect. I’m very happy with the quality for the cost (I picked these up on sale). They are soft, and the neckline is satisfactory. I really like the thickness of the cotton, it’s perfect for an undershirt in my opinion. Not thin, but not as thick as a quality T-shirt. Perfect for somebody like me who always wears a couple of layers on top of the undershirt since I am cold all the time. I was using Hanes lower cost undershirts for the past 15-20 years. I don’t know the different levels of Hanes undershirts quality, but the ones I was buying were roughly a few dollars per undershirt, and I replaced them every year with new ones. One thing that I clearly noticed is that the quality of the Hanes undershirts declined over the years. They used to be thick cotton and last a lot longer, enduring all those wash and dry cycles over a year. Nowadays, they are thin and not nearly as long lasting. The last five years I have had to replace the undershirts in less than a year due to the declining quality. These Gildan undershirts are similar in quality to the Hanes undershirts I used to buy long ago. They cost just a little bit more than today’s Hanes, but the overall quality is much better, and they are a lot more comfortable. Don’t forget, if you want these to last, be very careful with the heat when drying. So yeah, great undershirts. I will continue buying these as long as the quality does not decline and the price remains reasonable. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 5, 2026
reviews.title: Good quality and value for my son!
reviews.body: I bought the Gildan Men’s Crew T-Shirts multipack on Amazon for my 12-year-old son, who is on the heavier side and thus sometimes difficult to shop for. Pre-teen kids grow fast and go through clothes quickly, so I didn’t want to spend a lot of money on basics he’ll probably outgrow in a year. These shirts are really affordable, especially for a multipack, and the quality is surprisingly good for the price. The fabric is soft and comfortable, and my son says they feel good to wear all day at school. They’re lightweight and did not shrink after washing. I also like that the shirts don’t get stretched out like some cheaper T-shirts do. The fit works well for him too. They’re simple, classic crew neck tees that can be worn on their own or layered under hoodies and jackets. We’ve used them for school and just everyday wear. Another thing I appreciate is that they’re easy to care for. I just toss them in the wash and dryer and they come out looking fine every time. Overall, these are a great value. If you need affordable, comfortable basic T-shirts for a growing kid (or an adult!), this pack is definitely worth buying.

reviews.title: Feel great, look great. Very happy with these.
reviews.body: While I haven't gone through all 12 shirts, so far I've found nothing wrong with the ones I have tried. These shirts are super soft and feel great to the touch. The color, black, is as expected and I've had zero issue with fading (though I'm very careful when laundering new black shirts, especially the first several washes and rarely ever put them in the dryer). I ordered large, since that's what I always order just to play it safe, and these fit as expected. I would say they might be a bit snugger than you might like, so you might want to consider a size up if these aren't meant to either be undershirts, or to show off your physique. The neck line is a normal size, not too loose or too tight. The length is long, perfect for tucking in and staying put. The only thing you might consider is cutting off the tag. These are probably the first shirts I've had in years that actually have a tag in the back of the neck. The tags are long, so honestly, I don't even notice them. Overall, these are great quality shirts. They fits nicely, and the length is perfect for staying put. I will definitely consider this brand when shopping for v-neck or pocket shirts as well. I should add, I got these for a really good price, and while that always influences my opinion, I'd be hard pressed to find any faults at even a higher price. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 5, 2026
reviews.title: Expensive Look Without The Expense!
reviews.body: Sizing: If you’re a true large like me and close to but less than fifteen pounds overweight, normal length and with a 44” chest, buy a medium and use the shirt to inspire you to lose the beer belly. If you have similar dimensions but are overweight by up to thirty pounds, get the large. Materials: The mediums are manufactured to 70% synthetic, 30% linen—which is a great mix, as is doesn’t have to be ironed after it’s washed and hung to dry, nor does it have to be ironed every time you get up from a chair. I’ve had many 100% linen shirts and sure, they look great after you spend thirty minutes ironing them, just to look like a crumpled up newspaper after you get out of your car. My experience with linen shirts is what brought me here. Unboxing the shirt: I threw it on an ironing board the moment I unbagged it. I tried the Synthetic setting on the iron—it wasn’t enough. I then tried the Wool setting and set the steam setting to constant medium to high. It worked great. I didn’t have to press down at all, just lightly glided the iron across wrinkled areas of the shirt. Within five minutes, the shirt looked like a hundred-dollar shirt. The material is light, yet feels heavy to the touch and breathes very well in the heat. The hidden buttons give a clean, modern look that allows the shirt to be worn with anything from shorts and sandals to dress slacks and shoes in a club. I like to wear these shirts, untucked with a pair of jeans and western boots. This shirt is very comfortable, fits nice and is extremely versatile. Read more Read more

reviews.title: YES PLEASE
reviews.body: i just can't afford luxury brand underwear (100% organic washed cotton panties in this economy!? lol!) and took a chance on these amazing underwear after buying random pairs of all different brands, fabrics, and cuts for years and always being so disappointed and uncomfortable with most budget-friendly underwear's suboptimal fit, annoying feel, and lack of moisture wicking that i would literally just opt to go commando. i hated wearing underwear. BUT THEN... i tried one pack of these, mostly based on the price point, and was instantly converted. i wear these literally every day. i have like 30 pairs. i threw most of my other underwear out. these are my holy grail of incredibly affordable underwear. these are so soft and so cozy in the leg and waistband that i don't feel them at all during the day. not a single pair has gotten holes or frayed or changed texture in the wash after maybe over a year of wear, they only got even softer and nicer. they didn't stretch out and get those annoying ripples in the hem when i gained and lost weight (5'2 from 130lbs-150lbs and back down), size M bikini cut totally accommodated my weight gain and never felt tight, and now that i've quickly lost weight again they still fit my body perfectly to form. my weight fluctuates a lot because i have PCOS and other brands of underwear i've tried just don't cut it in that department like these do, so fear not yo-yo weight ladies. the price point is actually insane for the level of comfort and durability. you will be shocked. reviews.body: I’m genuinely impressed with these Amazon Essentials cotton bikini briefs. Finding comfortable, breathable underwear that actually holds up after multiple washes can be a challenge however these exceeded my expectations. reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 8, 2017
reviews.title: I Love These Underwear and They are a Great Alternative to Expensive Ones!
reviews.body: Several months ago, I purchased some new cotton bikini underwear and prefer them over other, more revealing styles. I'm a mom and I've discovered I prefer comfort over style so cotton bikinis suit me really well! I saw these underwear and I'll admit, I was a bit skeptical because I wondered if they would be good quality or not. I have some items from the Amazon Basics line and like them so I figured I'd give these a try. The Amazon Essentials Cotton Bikini underwear come in a six-pack and you can currently choose from two styles: basic assorted and fashion assorted. The basic assorted package comes with the following colors: two white, one light pink, one light purple, one black, and one black and white stripe. The fashion assorted package contains: one salmon color, one navy, one navy and white stripe, one light purple, one white with black polka dots, and one white with black flowers. These underwear are made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane. You can machine wash in warm water and tumble dry low. These are made in Sri Lanka. I initially ordered the basic assorted package and liked them enough that I immediately ordered the fashion assorted package as well. The underwear are very soft and comfortable! I really like the variety of colors and I would buy more if they decided to provide more colors. I've washed these underwear several times now according to the instructions and I didn't notice any shrinking. The stitching looks like good quality and I love that they don't ride up, which means these will work nicely when I exercise! I usually wear yoga pants and notice slight panty lines but they are hardly noticeable if you aren't looking for them. The bikini style sits comfortably at my hip and the band at the waist measures 2 3/8 inches. For size reference, I am 5'6", 165 pounds with a bit of a belly after having my twins and I purchased the large size which fit perfectly. I generally wear a 10 or 12 in pants and am glad I purchased the large. Read more Read more

name: Carhartt Men's Iconic K87 Pocket T-Shirt
description: Elevate your everyday essentials with our K87 Men's Heavyweight Crewneck T-Shirt, the perfect blend of comfort, style, durability and safety. Made from 100% rugged cotton, this tee offers a soft, breathable feel that keeps you comfy all day long, whether you're at work or enjoying casual downtime. Designed with a loose fit it provides a boxy silhouette that ensures both style and freedom of movement. This plain, basic t-shirt features a front pocket, adorned with our iconic patch, for added convenience and practicality. Its heavyweight construction delivers a thick, quality fabric that was built to handle tough conditions, making it ideal for work or outdoor activities. The soft cotton keeps you cool and comfortable, while the loose fit makes it a versatile choice for any occasion. Available in sizes XLT and XL, and a variety of colors including neon high vis, this shirt is perfect for big and tall men who need a more spacious fit. Whether you’re looking for an essential piece for your work wardrobe or a stylish, comfy tee for everyday wear, this t-shirt delivers in both fashion and function. Comfortable, durable, and timeless—the Carhartt K87 is a must-have for every man’s wardrobe.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 12, 2026
reviews.title: good durable shirts
reviews.body: The Carhartt K87 pocket t-shirt is a classic for a reason. The heavyweight cotton material feels durable and high quality, making it great for both work and everyday wear. It holds up well over time and doesn’t feel flimsy like cheaper t-shirts. The loose fit is one of the standout features—it gives you plenty of room to move and stays comfortable even during long days. The chest pocket is a nice touch for small items, and the overall construction feels solid with minimal twisting after washing. Comfort-wise, it starts a bit stiff but softens up after a few washes, which is pretty typical for thicker cotton shirts. It’s also available in a wide range of colors, so it’s easy to grab a few and rotate them. The main downside is the fit can run large and slightly boxy, so you might want to size down depending on how you like your shirts to fit. Some people may also find the heavyweight fabric a bit warm in hot weather. Overall, it’s a reliable, long-lasting t-shirt that delivers great value for the price and is perfect if you want something durable and simple.

name: Nippies Nipple Covers for Women - Reusable Sticky Silicone Pasties with Travel Case - Original Circle or Lift Style Available
description: Made to wear with all your unlined bras and sheer knits, bristols 6 Nippies skin covers are designed with ultra-thin edges for a seamless look that will make it easy to go braless with absolute confidence.

specifications.Best Sellers Rank:
#13 in Clothing, Shoes & Jewelry (See Top 100 in Clothing, Shoes & Jewelry)
#1 in Breast Petals

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 30, 2024
reviews.title: Effective and Comfortable (especially for smaller busts)
reviews.body: First off I feel very weird writing a review for this product BUT it’s been such a game changer for me that, despite feeling awkward, I wanted to write a review. I have a ridiculously small chest, I wear a 32AA but if the size existed I’d honestly fit better in a 28-30AA. Therefore I have an EXTREMELY hard time finding any real bra that fits me well and what does fit the best is sports bras. Unfortunately most sports bras don’t really have enough padding to conceal the outlines of this part of the breast (unfortunately with being a very small bust size I feel as though it just makes it even more noticeable) especially with any semi-tight top and there is nothing I hate more than having it show even slightly. For most of my life I’ve just avoided tops that are tighter but with a recent wardrobe change it became unavoidable and I needed some lighter browns which made the whole situation worse. So I decided to give this a try. I am so so so glad I did! It gives me enough coverage that even with a lightly padded sports bra I can still wear a more form fitting lighter colored top. They last all day (even in the height of summer and being outside in the sun all day and being fairly sweaty). I’ve reused the same pair multiple times and the adhesive despite numerous times hand washing. To ensure a good firm stick I do take a witch hazel toner over the area to remove any lotion, I’m not sure it is necessary to do that but I just want to make sure they stay put. I have very sensitive skin and despite the great grip it never bothers me! The only thing I kind of dislike is that if you sweat when you remove these there will be a dampness to the skin and covers BUT the dampness never ever leaks or shows and it never causes any kind of a rash or reaction on me. In fact the first time I used these was on a 90° day and after 6 hours outside and being hot dressed up in my Ren Faire clothes I was completely taken by surprise when I did remove them and discovered it was slightly damp, so you really can’t tell. I’m personally not a person that sweats much so my sweating in those conditions is much less than most people so perhaps someone else would have a different experience with these. The lack of sweating also means body odor really isn’t something I really worry about (I mean I use deodorant because you should not because I actually need to and that’s about the extent of my worry) but even with that dampness there was no odor. So for me that one things I’m not fond of is totally endurable because this product allows me to wear so many more tops with less self-consciousness! I have no idea if these are better or the same as cheaper brands because this was the first I tried and it worked so well I don’t plan on switching! I even swam with these once and they stayed on all day. I play volleyball, catch, frisbee, etc in the pool and don’t often dunk and swim a ton so if you swam submerged for hours I have no idea if they’d stay but for my activity that includes some dunking these things didn’t budge! I only got to try them once but this is going to allow me to wear a lot of bikini tops I would have avoided before! Seriously, life changing! Read more Read more
reviews.variant: Size: Size 1 (Fits A-C Cups)Color: Circles Crème

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2011
reviews.title: UPDATED 4/2/12: One of the best purchases I've ever made.
reviews.body: I'm a small B-cup and don't really need a bra, and find bras uncomfortable. So, I bought my first pair of adhesive Nippies back in January. I have worn them nearly every day since then, and for me, they have been about as perfect as a product could be. Comfort: They're extremely comfortable -- so comfortable, in fact, that I occasionally forget to take them off before going to sleep because I forget they're there. I was afraid that the adhesive might irritate my skin, but it hasn't at all. They stay on very well and are easy to wash after use (I use plain old soap and water). Coverage: The coverage they provide is remarkably good, given how extremely thin they are. I can wear a form-fitting white tee-shirt with just the Nippies underneath, and my nipples aren't visible. I recently tried one other brand of nipple covers (Spicy Spot) because they were less expensive, and although they were thicker than Nippies, they were almost completely transparent and my nipples were quite visible under light-colored shirts. So in terms of how well they do their job, Nippies have definitely been worth the money for me. I love not having to worry about bra straps showing! Lifespan: As I said, I wore my first pair almost every day for 3+ months, so my estimate is that they've lasted about 100 wears. They have just now gotten to the point where enough of the adhesive has worn away that I can't wear them with looser shirts (though they're still fine with more form-fitting shirts, which hold them in place). I just ordered my second pair. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on June 7, 2011
reviews.title: great product but read the fine print
reviews.body: I got these to try out because I recently purchased some new bras that are not padded; just thinly lined. I had hoped with this horrid summer heat and humidity the unpadded bras would not get so damp from me sweating. The problem with the unlined bras is nipple show through so, after reading about various products in this category, I tried these. They are simple to apply and come in a rather sturdy flip-top case that can be used to keep them clean and in shape. Upon arrival they have tissue-like paper against the adhesive part and each is set on top of a thin plastic domed form for keeping them separated and in proper shape. To apply, I peeled away the tissue paper, placed the product adhesive side up in the center of my palm, leaned over and applied it, holding it in place a second or two as instructed so body heat helps adhere the adhesive to skin. It was smooth and flat without any wrinkles or puckers. That was at 4am this morning when I got dressed. It was pretty much invisible and I must admit, once I put my bra in place I could not tell I was wearing them. I could tell, however, that I had no peek-through or poke-through of my bra or my thin summer tank top. That is until I stopped in the grocery store and got to the frig/freezer sections. By the time I got out of that section of the grocery store, nothing short of a patio brick would have stopped my show through so if that is the reason you're looking at these, I'm not sure they will be the cover you desire. Durable, waterproof, and simple to clean (great for playgrounds and puddles). Stylish color that pairs with everything. Highly recommend for everyday wear. My son absolutely loves them.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026
reviews.title: Perfect pristine condition
reviews.body: Bought this in a neutral light green for my grandson's extra shoes for his weekend visits. Got a size larger than what he wears now, so he has to wear them "four-wheel drive" (w/ straps). Honestly, I just got the cheapest in this size, because he's at that big growth time, and they'll end up in the charity box before he wears them out. Crocs are of a good quality, and seem ideal for little growing feet. They clean up easily in the dishwasher or with a little scrub in the sink. They're easily replaced, and if they get swept up by the wind and deposited into a lake, they will float and may be easily fetched up in a net and returned to the owner (true story). Crocs dry fast, and keep feet from lingering odors without additives.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026
reviews.title: My kid LOVES them!
reviews.body: The ivory kids Crocs were a huge hit in our house. They’re lightweight, comfortable, and easy for my kid to put on by herself. She loved the neutral color because it matches everything, and the fit was perfect for all-day play. What made them extra special was picking out fun charms to decorate them! She was so excited to personalize her Crocs and show them off everywhere we go.

There’s plenty of other stylish and nice looking shoes that are just as comfortable. The cost of crocs is crazeeee! That’s why I will only give 4 stars. However, it was all about pleasing my grandkid.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Feels like a second skin
reviews.body: Omg ❤️ where do I start? I want to start by saying, this is a well crafted bra. They thought hard & carefully about the woman's physique 💯 This bra is so comfortable that you literally forget you're wearing it! It conforms to your body, and lift the girlies up without being uncomfortable. It is definitely full coverage, you won't have extra skin overlapping from under your armpits or back fat showing in your clothes. I'm living proof that you can wear a tight fotting t-shirt & still be confident in your choice. This bra 💯 is the bomb 💣 the material is super soft and sturdy. No annoying underwire any where! If I could explain it, its like having breast augmentation. The girls are sitting perky. I tell you, you can sleep in this bra and won't remember you're wearing it. It does have very light padding that can be removed. The straps are wide & so comfortable, it don't dig in your shoulders. The bra hides back and side fat flawlessly ❤️ smoothes and shapes your torso. It has many levels of eye hooks but also comes with extra hooks. THEY THOUGHT OF EVERYTHING ❤️ I have never had a bra that was this comfortable and affordable. Not to mention it is also very sexy. If I were you ladies I would run NOT walk or stroll, But RUN & get yourself a few of these fabulous bras. You will not be disappointed 💯 I wish I could give this 10 stars ✨️ but 10 outta 10 I highly recommend

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 1, 2026
reviews.title: Great fit and comfort at an affordable price
reviews.body: After losing a significant amount of weight, I found it impossible to find a bra that fit. I bought many bras that have ended up un-worn in the back of a drawer. I am happy to have finally found a bra that fits and is comfortable. I ordered size small. The material and banding feel great. All parts of the bra stay in place. Nothing shifts around and the straps don't fall down. Snap extension are provided, if needed. The wide bands help smooth the underarm and back area. These bras are lightly padded, and I do not like bras that don't have the padding completely stitched down all the way around because the padding bunches up in the wash and is difficult or impossible to straighten out. The only drawback to these bras is that the padding isn't stitched all the way around. After one hand-washing (as recommended), the padding stayed in place. Hand-washing is inconvenient so I may try to machine wash one of the 3 I bought to see if the padding remains in place. At any rate, if I have to completely hand-stitch the padding in myself, it will be worth it for the comfort and sizing these bras provide. The pricing is good for the quality of these bras. I will definitely be buying more. I wish they came in a dark brown color.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 15, 2026
reviews.title: Comfortable bra
reviews.body: I have been looking everywhere for a comfortable bra and finally found one. They are soft and supportive. It has thick shoulder straps so it does not dig into my shoulders. The band is wide so it does not have any bulging on the side. They are also not overly expensive. For reference I am a 38 d and ordered the xl.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 29, 2026
reviews.title: Super comfortable! No more wires🎉
reviews.body: This is a SUPER comfortable bra! And I am so thankful for the extender. As I am not very large as a 36 C but without the extender, the medium was just a bit too tight as I don’t like the snug feeling. So I just needed that one more extra row which was perfect. I have been an underwire bra girlie for the last 25 years when my pups decided they were moving further south so needed that extra support. So have been skeptical about no underwire bras to look too saggy. This bra brings them up and looks great! It’s fantastic quality. I recommend airing out for 24 hours as has a little chemical smell. Just like a gell pillow 😂 But went away quickly. The price is very fair for the overall value.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Small band/large breasted women lose again (too big and too small at the same time)
reviews.body: So bummed. This bra was super comfy, BUT … the band was too big, and the cups too small. I was on the last clasp available, and still wished there was another row or two to further tighten it. But at the same time, I was spilling out of the tops of the cup. If I rearranged I could get them “un-spilled” at the top, there was spillage in the underarm area (women, you know what I mean by this…). Granted, I’m a busty gal. I wear a 36 H, sometimes a G, and sometimes an I … it depends on the bra. But I read everything I could on this bra - and read a lot of reviews too - so I thought I was making a good choice with my size, but … nope. I considered trying a replacement by going up a size, but if the cups fit on a larger one, surely, the band would be even bigger as well … and I was already wishing for a tighter band. So, return it I must. Bummer drag. I loved the feel of it, and it DID provide lift; I could also see that it would have given a nice shape if only there had been a teeny bit more room in the cups. The material was buttery and soft and I really liked it; I’m sad to have to return it. We small backed but large breasted women lose again. 😕

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 27, 2026
reviews.title: This is the perfect bra for me & my girls
reviews.body: This is the best bra that I've worn in a very long time. This bra holds in my girls in & this bra holds in any of my loose skin in my back and sides. I purchased my true size which I wear a 36C so I purchssed the Medium size. It looks beautiful and if you need to change the straps in the back to criss cross this is the perfect bra for it. This bra doesn't rise up in the front, sides or back. I've worn this bra for 10 hours and it still feels great on. Thank you for this wonderful bra.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 23, 2026
reviews.title: Comfort, fit, value, support, Im in heaven wearing this bra!
reviews.body: I love this bra !! Let me say this again. I frickin LOVE LOVE LOVE this bra. I ordered two of them, same size, different colors( black and rose). They are unbelievably comfortable. So much so, I might just sleep in this thing. I was reluctant to purchase these because the price was so reasonable I thought to myself, " how good can it be for under $20.00 right"? Well its better than good. Its great! Trust me, if you want a comfortable bra that gives you the support and feels so soft and squishy and so yummy, you dont want to take it off. BUY this bra! You will not be sorry. The only thing I had to do when I first put it on was to adjust the straps a small amount. Other than that, this thing fits like BUTTER! Really, You will not regret buying this. Such a great value. I will definitely be buying more. FYI, Usually, I buy much more expensive bras and typically bras like Shapermint or Bali. This brand beats the heck out of those two.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 1, 2026
reviews.title: Very good bra
reviews.body: This is a very good, well made bra. I like the wide straps; wide sides and back minimize appearance of side/back fat; wide straps are very comfortable; the band extender is helpful (didn't really need it); general style is youthful and brown color looks very nice on me. I would definitely consider purchasing it again. My size is 34DD & sometimes DDD. (dress size 10/12) I ordered size M. Reasons why I didn't give it a 5 star rating: 1. The cups fit well, however my breasts are not separated in this bra, so I find that I'm a bit sweaty in that area when I'm active. 2. The front of the band rolls but it's not uncomfortable...just not sexy :-) 3. The pads are good but need to be repositioned after washing. (Please use lingerie bag if washing by machine.) Helpful improvements to this product would be: engineer a design to lift and separate fuller breasts to improve appearance in clothing and minimize sweat between breasts. Develop a band that doesn't roll in the front. Attach the cups so that they stay in place when machine washed. I personally would be willing to pay a little more for these improvements. Read more Read more

reviews.body: This bra is very well made and a quality product! I was going to return because I prefer to have a little better coverage under the arm… but the customer service agent gave me a few options (to mail back to them for full refund at their cost or be refunded 50% and keep the bra to give to someone else (I chose the latter) this is an expensive bra but quality products are worth it!

reviews.title: Too expensive for quality
reviews.body: Very disappointing. Definitely not worth the cost

reviews.date: Reviewed in Canada on December 22, 2025
reviews.title: A RIP OFF when trying to refund/return, SIZING WAY WAY OFF
reviews.body: Sizing is Way, way off. I ordered according to their chart, the band was at least 6 inches apart from where it should hook up, the shoulder straps were so short the bra cups were around my neck. When I requested a refund, the return label was written in Chinese with a Chinese address, contrary to Amazon's return policy: Third-Party Seller Returns When you order from a third-party seller that fulfills and ships their own inventory, your return is sent back to the seller instead of Amazon. Sellers must offer one of the following: A return address within Canada where you can ship the item A prepaid return label; or A full refund without requesting the item be returned For more information about returns to sellers, please refer to Returns to Third-Party Sellers. And, according to other purchasers, the cost to return was more than the cost of the item. So, basically a rip off.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Canada on December 15, 2025
reviews.title: DON’T DO IT!!!
reviews.body: Very disappointed. Sizing way out of wack. I am usually a 2XL and I order a 4XL and it was still too small. Don’t believe the size chart!! Not worth the time it took to get here or the price. I have submitted request for return but don’t have much hope. The shipping to send back, which I am sure I will be on the hook for, won’t be worth the price of the terrible product. Besides the size the fabric is flimsy and clasps don’t seem like they would last too long. All in all I would rather spend a few more $ and get something will last, cause I doubt this would.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Canada on December 26, 2025
reviews.title: Cup sizing is Very small regardless of what size you order
reviews.body: This is a beautiful well made bra HOWEVER the sizing is an absolute joke. I ordered anXXL as I am a 34 E. The cup size is a B possible C at best. End up up giving it to my daughter. If you have extra large sizing the cup size needs to adjust accordingly

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Clean look, comfortable stretch, and “I actually have my life together” energy
reviews.body: The J.VER Men’s Dress Shirt is one of those shirts that quietly does a lot of heavy lifting for your appearance. Out of the package, it already looks sharp—solid color, clean stitching, and that classic button-down style that works whether you’re heading to work, a dinner, or just trying to look like you didn’t roll out of bed five minutes ago. The stretch is the real win here. It moves with you instead of turning into one of those stiff shirts that makes you feel like you’re auditioning for “Mannequin: Office Edition.” You can actually sit, reach, and function like a normal human without hearing fabric complain. Wrinkle-free claim? Pretty accurate. It comes out looking decent enough that you’re not stuck doing emergency ironing while questioning your life choices five minutes before leaving the house. Fit is solid—structured enough to look tailored, but not so tight that you feel like you’re in a social experiment. It hits that sweet spot between business and “I might still go out after this.” From a grown-man perspective: this is a reliable “default shirt.” The one you grab when you need to look presentable without overthinking it. reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 19, 2026
reviews.title: Soft, Relaxed Fit Tee That Gets Better with Every Wash
reviews.body: I ordered the Comfort Colors Adult Heavyweight Short Sleeve tee and it honestly lives up to the name. The fabric has that thicker, broken-in feel right out of the package. It is soft without feeling thin or flimsy, and it has that slightly faded, lived-in look that Comfort Colors is known for. The fit is relaxed but not sloppy. It hangs nicely without clinging, and the heavyweight cotton gives it structure. It feels durable and well made, especially around the collar and seams. After washing, it softened even more but didn’t shrink much or lose its shape. What I like most is how versatile it is. It works for casual days, layering, or even as a simple everyday staple. The colors also tend to have that washed, vintage vibe rather than looking overly bright or synthetic. Overall, this is a dependable, comfortable T-shirt that feels like it will last. If you like a slightly heavier cotton with a relaxed fit, this one is a solid choice.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 21, 2026
reviews.title: Comfort Colors Are THE BEST!!
reviews.body: I can’t say enough good things about Comfort Colors t-shirts! My husband and I both love them. The quality is excellent. We love that they are 100% cotton with a soft, almost vintage, wash. They fit consistently true-to-size and are offered in a variety of great colors. They are durable. After many washes, ours have not shrunk or faded. The price is very low considering the high quality! We have purchased Comfort Colors brand t-shirts numerous times and will continue to be big fans!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 26, 2026
reviews.title: Comfort + all the new Colors!
reviews.body: Comfort Colors t-shirts are super soft, thick heavyweight cotton, durable, proportioned perfectly, and now offer so many more colors to choose from! I ordered multiple, new t-shirts for summer. I love how soft and thick these shirts are and they breathe so well. I seek out this brand when I’m buying printed, souvenir t-shirts while on vacation. So, I am thrilled to be able to buy unprinted versions here. They take a beating and wash and dry well. This brand is incredibly consistent in their quality, always winning.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 19, 2026
reviews.title: Neck opening is too small, and I have a small head
reviews.body: I like the shirts, they have good color, seem well stitched, but the neck opening is really small. I am a woman who has to wear children's hats because women's hats are too large. So the fact that even I have a problem getting them over my head is really bad. The neck opening needs to be wider. Other than that, these are nice. Good material, well stitched, great colors.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 15, 2025
reviews.title: New Favorite Shirt (Especially if you’re a big dude)
reviews.body: Big guy here (6 foot 4, 275lbs, wide frame). Ordered these comfort colors shirts in black and white (size 2XL). They have become my new favorite go to shirt. Why? Material: 100% cotton (no synthetics) with a soft feel Fit: Great fit overall, including arm sleeves and neck. Very comfortable, with a nice little weight to the shirt (not thin). Length is awesome. I’m able to put my hands up in the air without my tummy showing. Versatile: Can pair these shirts with jeans as is for a great look or spruce it up a bit more by adding in a jacket on top. I wear them to work, out with friends, and for bowling due to how comfortable it is. Durability: So far the shirts have been held up (2 months in) after multiple washes (wash on cold, dry delicate). I wash the white shirts with detergent and bleach to keep them bright white. Value: Good price point for the shirts vs other brands on/off Amazon Other shirts I’ve liked: I used to wear the True Classic shirts (own 20+), but the quality and sizing has been all over the place with the last few orders. I still have those, but prefer these comfort color shirts due to the comfortable fit, quality, length, and overall value of the shirt. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 5, 2025
reviews.title: Comfort Colors T-shirt sizing is inconsistent from shirt to shirt
reviews.body: Do a search in the reviews of these T-shirts using the word “inconsistent” and you’ll see others have similar comments to mine. With almost 27,000 reviews on these shirts, not sure if anyone will even see this review, but here we go. I have about 5 Comfort Colors T-shirts that I got in the past year; all are size Large, and they fit great in the body and neck with nice soft cotton, and they are fantastic T-shirts. I recently ruined a denim-colored Comfort Colors T-shirt using Spray-n-Wash on a couple food stains on the chest; the Spray-n-Wash faded the blue color in the treated areas. No worries, I’ll just order a replacement shirt…. I decided to order two replacement Comfort Colors T-shirts with one being blue jean-colored and the second being a denim-colored T-shirt. Both are blue with blue jean being slightly lighter blue than the denim, but I decided to order two since I like these T-shirts so much. The blue jean shirt arrived and fit great and is just like all my other large Comfort Colors shirts, and it’s a keeper. However, the denim shirt I received was too small: it was tight in the chest, the body was shorter, and the sleeves were shorter. I have attached two photos with one showing this new denim shirt on top of the shirt I ruined with Spray-n-Wash and another showing this new denim shirt on top of an orange Custom Colors shirt to show the smaller size of the new shirt. The neck-size in the new denim shirt I received was fine, but the shirt was noticeably too small in all other dimensions. I immediately ordered another denim-colored shirt hoping to get a “correct size” shirt, and the second denim shirt arrived the next day, and it was also smaller in all the dimensions exactly like the first denim shirt I had just ordered. All three of these new Comfort Colors shirts (one blue jean and two denim) and the denim shirt I ruined with Spray-n-Wash were sold and delivered by Amazon (i.e. none were third party vendors). I’m returning both of the too-small denim-colored shirts, and I’ll live without that color and enjoy my new blue jean shirt. Read more Read more

reviews.title: Great Fit, Durable Quality, and Excellent Value
reviews.body: I recently bought the Rustler Men’s Classic Relaxed Fit jeans for my brother, and I’m honestly impressed with the quality for the price. The fit is exactly what he was looking for—comfortable, relaxed, and not too tight, which makes them great for everyday wear. The material feels durable without being too stiff. reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 18, 2026
reviews.title: Why I only buy Rustler, Wrangler and Lee.
reviews.body: Why I only buy Rustler and Lee (Protect your pride and your comfort) If you want to know why most modern jeans feel like trash, it’s the fabric. Take a look at Gap, Levi’s, and the other big "fashion" brands. Most of them aren't even 100% cotton anymore—they’re full of plastic and "stretch" fibers. Real men don't need plastic in their pants. Those cheap brands also use a Right-Hand Twill weave (running bottom-left to top-right). Over time, that weave forces the jeans to twist, making the left leg tighter and mushing your GONADS into your leg. It’s annoying, it’s uncomfortable, and it’s weak. If you value your testosterone and your comfort, stick to Lee, Rustler, and Wrangler. Rustler and Wrangler use a Broken Twill weave. It’s a heavy-duty, 15oz, 100% cotton denim that actually molds to your body instead of fighting it. Because the weave is balanced, it won't twist and crush your anatomy. Lee uses a high-quality Left-Hand Twill that stays soft and straight without that cheap shrinking and leg-twist you get from the other guys. Do your body and Western Civilization a favor: make peace with your GONADS, be a man, and buy a pair of heavy-duty Rustlers. High-quality jeans for a price that doesn't break the bank. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 20, 2026
reviews.title: My new favorite no show socks
reviews.body: I have very high arches which means most no show socks don’t stay on my heels. Plus I where a size 5 and most socks are for size 5-10 which results in extra material that rubs uncomfortably against my toes. I had a list of features I looked for: bamboo or organic cotton content, not super thin but not thick, high enough on the heel they would stay in place but low enough they wouldn’t show when wearing loafers or flats. The Wernies socks check every box. They fit my feet like they were made for them. They don’t squeeze my toes and hug my arches well. The seam across the toes is positioned well so it doesn’t chafe. There’s a special stretch band around the heel that keeps the socks in place even with my joggers. They do not show when wearing my loafers and flats. I have washed them a dozen times now in cold water on the gentle cycle and tumble on low heat. Washing the socks has not changed the fit or feel. I love them enough I ordered another set. If I could I’d give them an extra star just because they don’t come connected by those plastic pieces that either snag your socks or leave a hole. The socks come in a large flat package.

description: The Wrangler Authentics collection delivers laid-back style for the man on the go. reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 23, 2026
reviews.title: Comfortable and convenient
reviews.body: Got these to replace some old cargo shorts that aren't made anymore and are developing holes. So far I have been very pleased. The waist fits true to size and the fit is relaxed through the seat and thigh, which is exactly what I was looking for since I have somewhat stout thighs relative to my waist. I'm 6'0", about 200lbs, with a 34-35" waist. The material feels sturdy without being overly heavy, about as thick as old ripstop BDUs. Front slash pockets are generously deep; no problem carrying a 5.5" smartphone in there. Rear pockets are sufficiently deep and are narrow enough that a trifold wallet won't turn itself sideways. Cargo pockets are adequately sized and have hook and loop closures at the corners. The "tech" pocket behind the left cargo pocket is very convenient for me, as I'm used to carrying my phone on that side. I can slide my Samsung Galaxy S25 in there and it fits well without worrying about it falling out. I wore these for a couple of days at Disney World last week and they performed very well. Moving my phone to that tech pocket made rides with lap bars or belts much more comfortable. I even washed these shorts at the resort so I could wear them on the long drive home. If I could change anything about them, I'd add about an inch of length, as I prefer a full 11" inseam on cargo shorts. And maybe add a button or some kind of closure to the rear pockets. But aside from that, these have been pretty close to perfect. I expect I'll order more as I replace more of my older cargo shorts. Read more Read more

After several washes, still feels great and fits great.

reviews.title: Super Comfy!!
reviews.body: When I ordered these flip flops, due to the very low price, I was not expecting much. The footbed is surprisingly squishy (almost like walking on a yoga mat), and the straps don’t rub or dig in at all—which is rare for something this inexpensive.
