reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026
reviews.title: runs big
reviews.body: I am always a size 8 in boots, sandals, sneakers and read these ran large so ordered a size 7.5. They are still too big on me. I sent back for a 7 and I will update when I get those. They are very, very cute and comfortable! I love the cloth that goes over the foot!! That makes them seem a bit more fancy than regular flip flops. They also do sound like regular flip flops, so if you want a quiet sandal these are not for you. They are very cushioned and I can def feel the arch support. You will need to size down at least half size and maybe one whole size. The hardest thing for me was to pick a color! May have to get several pair! Just ordered my mom the dark blue and I know she will love them!!! Highly recommend, especially for the low price! Update: Got the 7 and are still too big. As I said, I got my mom the 6 so I tried them on and they are still a tad too big on me!!! BTW the sizes 8,7.5,7 and the 6 I can hardly see any difference whatsoever! They don't come in 5 1/2 so I am sending the 7 back for a 6 and keeping those just because they are so darn cute and comfortable! I also don't have a very thick foot so I wish the straps were a tad tighter, but I will deal with it. So, to sum up: Be sure to size down at least one size and maybe even two. Returns are easy, so maybe try a few different sizes! I haven't worn a size 6 since I was in about the 6th grade, so not sure what is going on with the sizing. Oh yeah, I did get three different colors and the sizing was the same with all three. HTH! Good luck! Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 7, 2026
reviews.title: Nice simple flip-flops, but the straps are soft fabric that collapse
reviews.body: Nice and simple flip-flop. I'll wear these around the house, the yard, and outside. They're what I call "multi-tasking" flip-flops. But, keep in mind, the straps are a soft fabric.....at least the ones I got in WHITE.......and that means they collapse and lay down on the flip-flop, so it's not easy to just slide into these and go. You have to hold up the straps & move them around, in order to wear these. I've had many, many flip-flops in my time, and the straps are always structured & standing up. Slide into them, and go. Not with these. That's the only negative feature. They're comfortable, true-to-size, and the strap doesn't hurt me at all between my toes (as some others have said it hurts them). All-in-all, I'm happy with this item and will keep it, but get ready to adjust & fiddle with the strap before you can start walking.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 2, 2026
reviews.title: Accurate, Compact, and Great for Avoiding Airline Surprises
reviews.body: This luggage scale is a simple tool that solves a real travel problem. It’s compact enough to keep in a carry-on or suitcase pocket, and it’s easy to use—clip it to the handle, lift briefly, and get a clear weight reading. The display is easy to read, and the measurements have been consistent when compared against airline scales. The strap feels secure when lifting heavier checked bags, and the overall design is lightweight without feeling flimsy. It’s especially helpful when packing close to airline weight limits, since it removes the guesswork and helps avoid overweight baggage fees at the airport. The reason this isn’t a full five-star rating is that the plastic body, while functional, feels cheap rather than premium. It works exactly as intended, but it doesn’t have a high-end build feel. For practical travel use and peace of mind at a reasonable price, it’s a very useful addition to any travel kit.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 26, 2026
reviews.title: Great little travel tool that saves money and stress.
reviews.body: I recently purchased the travel inspira luggage scale, and it is honestly one of those small purchases that makes a big difference when traveling. First off, it is easy to use. You just loop the strap around your suitcase handle, lift it for a few seconds, and the weight shows up instantly on the screen. The digital display is clear and easy to read. What impressed me most is the accuracy. I also liked the fact that it came with a battery already inside, ready to use. The only downside I have is you have to physically lift your luggage, which can be tough if your bag is very heavy, so you need to be very strong.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 14, 2026
reviews.title: Solid investment to not be paying extra at the airport
reviews.body: Works as it should , display and switching between kilo and lbs easy. Easy to use and you get the feeling of a quality product. I bought some recently for my adult kids but my battery in mine is going on 4 years.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 29, 2026
reviews.title: Great luggage scale!
reviews.body: This Travel Inspira luggage scale is a total lifesaver for anyone who travels regularly. It’s compact, lightweight, and incredibly easy to use—perfect for throwing into your bag without taking up any space. I never have to stress about overweight baggage fees anymore, which alone makes it worth it. The accuracy is spot-on, and the 110 lb (50 kg) capacity is more than enough for even larger suitcases. I also really appreciate the clear backlit LCD display—it’s easy to read in any lighting, whether you’re in a dim hotel room or a bright airport. The data lock feature is super helpful too, giving you time to check the weight without it disappearing instantly. Comfort-wise, the rubberized handle makes it easy to grip, even when lifting heavier bags. It feels sturdy and well-made, not flimsy like some other portable scales. The auto-off function is a nice bonus that helps preserve battery life, and it’s great that the battery is included right out of the box. Overall, this is a simple but essential travel tool that delivers exactly what it promises. Reliable, convenient, and stress-saving—I wouldn’t travel without it now. Highly recommended!

The display is clear and easy to read, even in low light, and the weight reading feels accurate and consistent. It’s very simple to use—just hook it onto the luggage handle and lift. The size is compact, so it fits easily in a bag or pocket, making it perfect for travel. I also like that it supports multiple units (kg/lb), which is very convenient. This scale has already helped me avoid overweight baggage fees, and it works exactly as described. Definitely a great value for the price. Highly recommended for frequent travelers.

reviews.title: My favorite shirt!
reviews.body: I love this shirt! I ended up buying it in several colors because the fit and material are just that good. It’s soft, smooth, and slightly silky, but still stretchy and comfortable. It hugs in the right places without feeling tight or restrictive. It is great to wear under other clothes as a complimentary accent piece as well. One of my favorite details besides the material is the sleeve length. I prefer sleeves that run a little long, and these sit just at the top of my hand instead of stopping awkwardly at the wrist. It gives it a more flattering, relaxed look. Kind of an odd favorite but I love it! Something to call out; I noticed that when you first get it, the fabric can show some odd imprints or marks (you can see a faint one in the chest area in my pics). After a couple of washes, that goes away but it seems like it takes a couple washes. Also, just a note on photos, the lighting can make it look slightly gray, but it is a true solid black in person. Overall, really impressed with the quality, fit, and feel. I want to get even more colors.

I wanted something that would arrive quickly and cheap since I won’t ever need to use them again! I would say the unisex sizing is off and they run way large (possibly 2 sizes). They go on like a sock. The stretchy material around your foot is like a bathing suit material and has a lot of give to it, so that (and the fact that it’s too large) my foot slides all around in the shoe and doesn’t feel secure. I normally wear an 8.5 or sometimes a 9 in sneakers. These seem more like a 10.5. I will return these and size down probably 2 sizes so that it will fit the bottom length of my foot and also feel secure with the stretchy material at the top. For the $5 price I can’t really complain about the minor inconvenience of wrong sizing but I do wish they would adjust the size chart. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026
reviews.title: They are very waterproof and fit fantastic. stitching and seams can handle an unfair stress test.
reviews.body: Tested, Very high quality and the advertising is complete truth. I specifically hooked my fingers on each side of the pockets and pulled to test the seams and pulling harder than you would ever actually pull, harder than even the pocket getting caught on something while walking, the stitching is solid and didn't even make a noise. The material is comfortable, I find them quite cooling. For anyone wondering about the water resistance like me, YES. It is very well water resistant I tested quickly splashing my leg with my sink and the water literally fell off like it was rain on a window, which was the entire reason I even bought these. The build quality in my unnecessarily rough stress testing is very good. I would buy these again and again personally. Also, about the fit, I'm a 28x30 but all they have is 30x30, yet these things fit more proper than my actually correct sized jeans and pants do on me The sizing is accurate, buy your size, but the pants are built to fit your figure while staying straight. In other words they are fitted, not skinny but just slightly tightened. If you like that look, buy your size. If you like a loose look, size up. These things are fantastic. Front and back pockets are deeper than jeans. My opinion, $35 is insanely good value, I wouldn't buy anything cheaper given how good these are for the price. I also wouldn't shoot higher like 50+ when these are an option. Read more Read more

reviews.title: Great fit for a 6'4" dad bod – comfy, lightweight, and deceptive enough to look formal.
reviews.body: I’m 6'4", about 250 lbs with a classic dad bod, and the 38x32 fit me perfectly. Waist and length are spot on. If you’re built anything like me (not exactly tour pro lean), these will probably work really well for you. Fit & Comfort: These are very comfortable, especially for long days. I’ve worn them for full rounds and all-day wear, and the stretch is in that sweet spot – enough give to move, bend, and swing without feeling sloppy. They are lightweight and breathable, which is huge when you’re walking in heat or just standing around on a warm day. I've also worn them to work, and nobody knows I'm wearing stretchy pants. The only downside for me is that the fabric can cling to my legs a bit, especially around the lower legs (almost a static cling type of thing). It’s not a dealbreaker, but if you hate any kind of cling, just know that going in. Look & Versatility: They look better than I expected at this price point. Easily pass for business casual with a polo or button-down, so I can go from course to casual dinner without looking like I’m in gym shorts. Clean lines, good shape, and they don’t scream “cheap golf pants.” Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 28, 2026
reviews.title: The Perfect Summer Shirt
reviews.body: I ordered four of these tops in different colors when Amazon was having a sale. I wasn't sure if a medium or large would fit best, so I purchased two medium and two large. They both fit beautifully! For reference, I am 5'9", 140 lbs and 34DDD. These have a slim fit, but not tight or clingy. If you prefer a more relaxed look, sizing up gives you a little extra room without being bulky or sloppy looking. The material is very soft and a decent weight where it won't be see through, but light enough to stay cool. It doesn't look like it will have issues with pilling. I haven't worn it in hot, humid weather yet, but I'm really hoping they breathe and are comfy then because they're so beautiful I'd love to order a few more! The color selection is fantastic--it's not often you find a shirt that has so many options for colors and they're all pretty, it was tough to choose! The neckline is so flattering as is the cut and fit of the rest of the shirt. The length is great to leave out or tuck in if you prefer and it can be dressed up or down. A great buy for a summer staple!

reviews.title: Great Top.

The fabric feels soft and comfortable, and the style is simple but flattering, making it easy to pair with jeans, shorts, or leggings. One thing to note is that it does run a bit snug. If you prefer a more relaxed fit, I’d definitely recommend sizing up. Once you get the right size, though, it fits nicely and looks great.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 15, 2026
reviews.title: Flattering, Soft, Great Length & Whit Is Not See-Through
reviews.body: really love these tops. I’ve ordered several different colors because the fit is just that good. They’re flattering without being too tight and have a really nice slim, fitted look. You can easily dress them up for business with slacks or a blazer, or dress them down with jeans or shorts for a casual outfit. They’re very versatile. One thing that really impressed me — the white is not see-through. That’s huge for me because so many white tops are. The material is thick but still soft and comfortable. It feels high quality without being heavy. I also love that they have some length to them. They’re not cropped or too short, which makes them easy to tuck in or leave out without worrying about them riding up. For reference, I’m 5’3” and 126 lbs. I ordered a large because I didn’t want them super tight, just more of a snug fit, and they fit exactly how I wanted. Definitely a great basic to have in multiple colors

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 28, 2026
reviews.title: My go to sweater!
reviews.body: I love these Amazon Essentials crewneck button down sweaters. I have 4 colors. I wear them in the spring, fall and summer. They are the perfect weight to keep me warm during cooler weather or in the air conditioning. It’s super comfortable and soft. The knit is very pretty and silky. The style is perfect for layering over any type of top. I can dress it up with a printed top and dress pants or dress it down with a graphic tee, jeans, and tennies. It hits me right at my waist and because it’s thin it doesn’t make me look bulky. I bought an XL. I am 190 lbs and 5’6”. I have a shorter torso than most women. My arms are a bit larger and the sweater doesn’t feel too tight it the arms. It’s super stretchy. The best part is the price for such a nice quality sweater and they come in so many colors. This is the reason I own so many of them.

It’s lightweight but not paper thin. I bought the orange one. It has a simple but quality look. And especially for the price, I find it to be a great purchase and I’m going to get the oatmeal colored one next. I’m 5”7, 135 pounds. The medium fits me perfectly.

HOWEVER, I did return this (and the red one I ordered) because the neckline is very loose and droopy. Others may like it like that, I do not. It looks like it wants to be a v-neck but misses.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 11, 2026
reviews.title: Rave approved
reviews.body: First time using fashion tape and these worked amazingly well! I used them to hold up my leg warmers for a rave and they never slipped or fell. Wore them for about 7 hours of dancing and jumping and they never felt like they were falling! Never had to reapply tape. The hold is super strong! If anything they were a little hard to remove from the leg warmers at the end of the night so I would keep that in mind when using with certain clothing. They’re really easy to place. Overall I’d buy again!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 26, 2026
reviews.title: Durable and effective unless you’re doing Just Dance 2’s Rasputin
reviews.body: Got the job done for the wedding I was in! Stuck to my body for a good while, only came off when I got very sweaty and was jumping around.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Works as Described
reviews.body: I have a formal dress that I absolutely love, but it is just slightly loose in the chest area. This means that when I raise my arm, my chest gets exposed! I am super not about that, so I used this tape to help keep the dress in place and completely covering my chest. I tested it a few times by putting my arms in the air and windmilling, and no movement! I then wore the dress to a company awards ceremony (about 3-4 hours) with no problems. I now keep this tape in my garment bag and my travel case!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on November 26, 2025
reviews.title: Reliable fashion tape
reviews.body: Removing the tape can be a little uncomfortable — it felt a bit like pulling off a band-aid (though the discomfort was brief). Because the hold is strong, if your skin is sensitive or you have a lot of movement (dancing, brisk walking, etc.), I’d recommend doing a small patch test first — on a less visible area — to make sure you’re okay with the adhesive. For some very delicate fabrics (like thin silk or lace), you might need to be cautious — I avoided heavy pulling or repositioning once the tape was on. If you want a simple, effective fashion solution for dresses, low-cut tops, strapless outfits, or just to prevent wardrobe malfunctions, this tape is worth owning. It’s not perfect — the removal isn’t completely painless — but the convenience and peace of mind it offers make it a solid 4-star product in my book. I’d recommend it to anyone who wants reliable “stay-in-place” support without bulky undergarments.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 26, 2026
reviews.title: easy to use
reviews.body: I bought this item for an emergency situation but then found out that it serves multiple purposes. I can use it almost in any occasions that need a quick fix for my dresses, ment the broken area, or shrik the sizes. I love the functionality and easy to use feature. will buy it again once I ran out.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 12, 2026
reviews.title: Great hold, not not without consequences
reviews.body: I really wanted to give this product 5 stars because the hold is incredible, unfortunately, the after effects force me to give it 3 stars. I’ve used this tape twice, both times with the same outfit: the “By the Lake” Padmé Amidala dress. The first time was on May the 4th at Disney, worn for about 5 hours. It held perfectly, even in the Florida heat, and I had zero issues. The second time, I wore it for nearly 12 hours. Once again, the hold itself was flawless, nothing shifted or moved. However, after several hours I began feeling pain and irritation where the tape was applied. When it came time to remove the dress, I had to be extremely careful because of how strongly the tape adhered to my skin. Despite being cautious, the tape peeled off skin in multiple areas, and I later developed very painful warts in those same spots. This was especially surprising because I do not have sensitive skin. My takeaway: this tape works very well, but I’d urge people to use it with caution. Avoid wearing it for long periods, and be especially careful if you have sensitive skin. If you do wear it for an extended time, be prepared for possible skin damage when removing it. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 5, 2026
reviews.title: HIGHLY RECOMMEND!
reviews.body: I bragged all night about how I’m going to leave this review on this double sided tape! Perfect tape to prevent any nip slips! Very easy to apply after whipping skin area with rubbing alcohol this did not ruin my dress as I am wearing a delicate mesh fabric cowl dress but the dress stayed in place all night I did not have to buy boob tape because it was safe and secure until I was ready to take it off I wore this from 9:30pm- 4:45am it was easy to take off I first took my dress off and the tape stayed on my skin and then I slowly removed the tape from my skin it was a little pain but I suggest just to remove it very slowly. - Andrea A.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 27, 2026
reviews.title: All in all, a nice hoodie..
reviews.body: Now, i ordered this for me..i have two old hoodies, and wanted a new one..though the person in the ad is a man. It’s a little big on me, but it’s nice. Not too thick fabrics, yet it does keep me warm. The price was very cheap, which i like a lot. Here’s my only complaint, the neck is too tight, though it helps to keep me warm, I don’t like too tight on the neck…so i carefully cut it down the middle, added a separating zipper, and that solved my neck issue, now its works great. Now, i know you’re probably not going to do what i did, and im not bragging ..just telling you about the neck, and that i determined to make this work. Could i have just lived with it that way? Yes, of course. And I’ve never done that before, and i worked out. ( i hate to send things back if i can make it work , right?!) So cheers for reading all this

reviews.title: Reliable Quality for College Band Camp
reviews.body: I ordered several Hanes products as a requirement for college band camp, and every item I purchased was great with no issues at all. These ComfortSoft t-shirts were exactly what was needed for long, demanding days. They’re soft, comfortable, and easy to wear, even during extended periods of activity. The fit was true to size and allowed for easy movement, which is important during rehearsals and outdoor practice. The fabric is breathable and comfortable, making it suitable for long hours in different conditions. Even after repeated washing, the shirts held their shape, stayed soft, and didn’t develop any noticeable wear or shrinkage. They also held up well through frequent use, sweat, and laundering, which is essential for something worn daily during band camp. The quality remained consistent, and there were no issues with seams, fabric, or comfort. Overall, these shirts are dependable, affordable, and perfect for college band camp requirements. They offer great value, consistent quality, and reliable comfort. I’m very satisfied with the purchase and would definitely recommend them for band camp or everyday wear.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 26, 2025
reviews.title: Good Quality But Sleeves Are An Issue
reviews.body: I'm giving this shirt 4 stars for one reason: the sleeves. I'm not sure why big and tall sizes have sleeve seams that go down so far past the shoulder and have a length that goes past the elbow. It's like you're wearing a tent. Why not make the chest and belly area bigger, which they do, but make the sleeves more proportionate? Not everyone who wears a 4XL is elephant-sized with long gorilla arms. I'd wager most aren't. With that said, the quality of the t-shirt is nice, and it's comfortable. It's a thicker cotton that held up well after a wash and didn't shrink too much. It fits well and is longer than a typical 4XL. I haven't noticed any loose threads or discoloration. It's well-made, and, given the price, is hard to complain about, despite my aforementioned gripe. I'm using these as blanks to press my own designs, so even if the sleeves are aggravating, it's cheaper to make your own clothes to wear than to spend $40 for a single graphic t-shirt at a big and tall store. If you can look past the sleeve issue, these t-shirts might be a good fit for you.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on November 6, 2025
reviews.title: Great, quality shirt I ordered 2 more 2-packs
reviews.body: I recently purchased the Hanes Men's Long-Sleeve Beefy Henley Shirt in XL, and I'm thoroughly impressed with its quality and design. In an era where current fashion trends push brands to make shirts as thin and cheap as possible—often using flimsy fabrics that pill after one wash—this Henley stands out as a refreshing throwback to durable, substantial clothing. The thickness of the material is one of my favorite features; it's hefty enough to feel premium and provide real warmth without being overly bulky, making it perfect for layering or wearing solo in cooler weather.The long-sleeve style is another highlight—classic and versatile, with a three-button placket that adds a touch of casual elegance. Whether I'm heading to a casual office day, running errands, or lounging at home, it fits seamlessly into my wardrobe. The cotton blend is soft against the skin yet tough enough to withstand repeated wear and laundering without losing shape or fading. I've worn it through several cycles already, and it still looks brand new.One note on sizing: these run a little larger than expected. I opted for an XL based on my usual fit, but an L would have worked just as well for a more tailored look without sacrificing comfort. If you're between sizes, definitely consider sizing down for the best result.Overall, this shirt exceeds expectations in build, style, and value. It's a reliable staple that proves you don't have to compromise on quality to stay stylish. Highly recommend for anyone tired of disposable tees—grab one (or a few) and feel the difference! Read more Read more

You'll also appreciate the button fly that stays smooth and the convenience of a 5-pack for stock-up ease.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Canada on June 25, 2025
reviews.title: Not happy…
reviews.body: I bought this for my grad, thinking it work great with an updo. Unfortunately the frame is entirely too big to look natural on someone’s head, but by design it must be this big to fit securely inside the cap. The headband piece that slides in is loose and not strong enough to stay in place on your head. The whole cap will look silly and flop around. Save your money, 4 bobby pins ended up working much better, and felt way more secure in my head. Also, when I tried to return the item I was given a return label that I would have to pay postage and duty fees on…. Very disappointed, I thought Amazon had a hastle-free return policy.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 4, 2026
reviews.title: Perfect summer tank top!
reviews.body: This shirt is soft, well made and fits well. I ordered the Large, Im 5'4", 145 lbs, 38d. It fits snuggly as I wanted. I decided on this size based on the reviews. I think the x large would have gaped at the arms. There shouldn't be much shrinking as it is not cotton, but itvfeels like cotton. I probably won't put it in the dryer. I liked it so much that I ordered the pink and blue shirts as well. I feel its a very nice shirt and price point. FYI, The white is not a stark white, more of a very light ivory. I noticed it immediately when I took it out of the bag, but it looks nice with my skirt. I can see the pads, but I usually wear a jean jacket or a light sweater anyway so it won't be noticeable. Like any undershirt with a built in bra, it is not for support. It will hold everything in place and the pads provide a little coverage. Overall, its a great summer t shirt!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 2, 2026
reviews.title: Comfortable and Convenient, with a Few Fit Limitations
reviews.body: This tank top is very comfortable and easy to wear, especially because of the built‑in bra. It’s nice not having to wear a separate bra, and the ribbed fabric has a great texture that feels soft and good quality. It seems well made, and I’m hoping it holds up after multiple washes. There are a couple of downsides to note. The top runs a bit short—I ordered a medium, and while it fits well overall, the length is shorter than expected. I also don’t think this would work well for anyone above a C or D cup. I’m barely a B, and the support is still fairly minimal. That said, it works well layered under a shirt or cardigan and is very comfortable and lightweight for casual wear. A good option if you’re looking for an easy, bra‑free top and are aware of the fit limitations.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2026
reviews.title: Perfect tank top!
reviews.body: This is a great tank top! The padding is sewn in. The fabric is soft and comfortable. The fit is true to size but fitted. I’m going to order more in a bunch of colors!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 17, 2026
reviews.title: Not good enough
reviews.body: The material of each color DIFFERS GREATLY and that's highly disappointing. The grey is super soft and comfy; the white (even the NEW white they swear isn't see-through) is much stiffer, thicker, and still see-through. They do not fit the same, even in the same size. The pad is comfortable in both fabrics, but it is one piece and sewn in, so it will either work perfectly for you or it definitely won't. It definitely DOES NOT work for me. My boobs pop out the sides of the pads, and I'm not super large-chested. I do not recommend this for wide set girlies, we gotta find something better than this. Disappointed.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 12, 2026
reviews.title: Built in Bra is PERFECT!!
reviews.body: This is the BEST top with built in bra ive ever purchased. Fits perfectly, looks natural and I definitely want MORE!! As a big busted woman, this top truly surprised me with the fit!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 16, 2026
reviews.title: Bra pads sewn in so they never get lost
reviews.body: I don’t know why these have a 4 star review. I give it 5 stars all the way!! I LOVE these so much I have them in every color and the black and white I have more than one because I don’t want to risk one being in the wash and not having it available to wear. I wear these to the gym with leggings and also under clothing to work and with weekend outfits. I LOVE them! They are so comfortable and the bra pads are sewn in so they never get lost in the wash. These are cute and versatile from gym to work to play. I’ve tried other brands very similar but always returned them because the pads aren’t sewn in. I love how these are always set in place and won’t shift around

reviews.date: Reviewed in Canada on January 13, 2026
reviews.title: Game changer
reviews.body: As someone who doesn’t like wearing bras, these CHICME built-in bra tank tops have been a total game changer for me. They give just the right amount of support without feeling tight, uncomfortable, or restrictive, making them a perfect everyday alternative to a traditional bra. The ribbed, fitted design is super flattering and hugs the body in all the right places. Every time I wear one, I get compliments on how put-together my outfit looks — these tanks really tie an outfit together, whether you dress them up or keep things casual. The racerback style adds a sporty, modern touch, and the fabric feels soft and high quality. They’re comfortable enough to wear all day while still looking stylish and polished. If you want comfort, support, and a flattering fit all in one piece, these tops are a must-have.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 7, 2026
reviews.title: Cat Lady Approved
reviews.body: I am a leggings snob and I immediately added more colors to my cart after receiving my order. The color is vibrant and they’re so soft while providing medium support. They don’t roll down or move during a cardio workout or yoga class and are still my go-to for a lazy day on the couch. I washed and dried them and they came out looking brand new. I’m also not seeing any pilling so far in the inner thigh area - which is a concern for most of my leggings. I also had one of my cats catch a claw on them and they didn’t tear or snag. They also don’t seem to attract too much cat hair - which is a great feature for the cozy cat ladies. They remind me of American Eagle Offline leggings as far as support but so far have held up better and seem to be of better quality IMO.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 4, 2026
reviews.title: Affordable Luxury: Soft, High-Waist CRZ Yoga Pants for All-Day Comfort
reviews.body: I recently purchased the CRZ Yoga High Waist Buttery Soft Workout Lounge Pants, and I’m in love. They’re incredibly soft, smooth, and stretchy, so I can move freely while exercising. The high-waist design is really supportive and stays in place, and even when I’m just lounging, they keep me feeling comfortable and stylish.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 21, 2026
reviews.title: Finally! Workout pants I love!
reviews.body: So much yes! However, I am petite so they fit me very well. So soft, not long, stretchy and not see through. They seem high quality, but I do think you may need to size up. I will definitely purchase another pair.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 15, 2026
reviews.title: TEN STARS
reviews.body: I would give these ten stars if I could. I have a very high natural waist, and often “high waist” leggings simply are not. These are, they stay put, they aren’t see-through, and they are SO SOFT. I work in a gym & wear leggings every day. Two hours into wearing my first pair, I ordered 5 more in different colors! The only change I would make is adding side pockets, but I can live without them since these hit every other need.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 9, 2025
reviews.title: Amazing Leggings! But when buying leggings for practice, you get what you pay for :)
reviews.body: First of all, let me say, these leggings are AMAZING: they're comfortable, fit perfectly, the material is as described - literally buttery - and they look incredible. This color is also gorgeous, it took a while for my size to restock just to get this color and it was worth the wait. HOWEVER, these being my first pair or CRZ leggings, I am a bit disappointed. I practiced in them 3 times and they seem really solid for moderate to low impact practice, especially Hot. They're very breathable. (I'm talking yoga here, but they'd also be very good for gym or running). Here's the CATCH: I wore them last weekend under a pair of sweats while hiking. I'm not sure how or when it happened, but after I got home, I noticed a huge hole just below the butt in the back center of my right leg. It looked a lot like a nylon tear or rip, rather than a tiny hole that you'd see with more durable, expensive fabrics. I say all this to say that when it comes to clothing whose durability you rely on, you really get what you pay for. I.E. My first pair of Lulu leggings were a pair of black Aligns and I wore them 2 years straight, never once ripping, snagging, no holes or otherwise, and I just regifted them because they still look nearly brand new. I am glad to know how CRZ's hold up now so I can use them for less rugged activity. Regardless, I still love them and I will still be purchasing this brand. I also won't be throwing them out, I've worn them a total of 4x, so I WILL find a way to layer or repair. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 9, 2026
reviews.title: Good product!
reviews.body: Honest review with pros and cons. I'd give these a 4.5 Pros- no sagging, smooth-soft fabric, thin like the Align but with a slightly less natural feel. I got the oasis blue and it was a perfect match to advertisement photos. Sizing is as anticipated Cons- while the leggings do not lose shape or sag, the top does roll down. But its not obnoxious- for me anyway, and probably wont roll while doing standing exercises like jogging. As stated earlier, these have a slightly less natural feel than the Aligns- less soft, more slippery, but not fake feeling and similar thinness and breathability. Overall, i need a red pair of leggings and likely WILL purchase them from CRZ. My favorites for a similar feel: Old Navy's Studiosmooth and cloudcomfy are fantastic options. Lulu Align's take second place, due to their high cost. These CRZs are a solid 3rd place, and a good dupe overall. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on November 29, 2025
reviews.title: The Most Comfortable Leggings I've Ever Worn!
reviews.body: CRZ YOGA Butterluxe Leggings have absolutely revolutionized my workout and loungewear wardrobe, delivering the perfect combination of comfort, performance, and style that I've been searching for! As someone who lives in leggings for everything from yoga classes to grocery runs, these have become my go-to choice that outperforms much more expensive alternatives. The buttery soft fabric is genuinely luxurious against the skin and feels like wearing a gentle hug all day long. The texture is smooth and silky without being slippery, creating incredible comfort that makes me forget I'm wearing them. Unlike other "soft" leggings that feel nice initially but become uncomfortable during extended wear, these maintain their comfort throughout entire days. What impressed me most is how the high-waisted design provides perfect coverage and support without creating the dreaded roll-down effect that plagues so many leggings. The waistband stays exactly where positioned throughout workouts, stretching, and daily activities while providing gentle compression that's supportive rather than restrictive. The 25-inch length is absolutely perfect for my 5'6" frame, hitting exactly at the ankle without being too long or too short. The proportions are flattering and versatile enough to work beautifully with sneakers, boots, or barefoot for yoga practice. The length creates a sleek, elongated silhouette that works for both athletic and casual styling. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 16, 2025
reviews.title: Great for big tummies
reviews.body: A friend recommended these and I’m obsessed now. Just ordered another pair after only having these for a week. They’re so silky and smooth. No idea what pants size I am right now (16-20?) but I’m 195 pounds, big tummy (I look like I could be pregnant), big thighs, big calves, and big muffin top. The amount of space my stomach takes up when I’m sitting down vs standing is really different, so I’ve only been doing stretchy waistband clothes the last few years since trousers and jeans either dig in when I sit down or fall down when I’m walking. These are perfect. I only do high waisted and these are very high waisted. They don’t feel too tight at all, yet they do feel like they hug and support me. The top part has only folded a tiny bit once, when I had just gotten in the car. But around the house they DONT slide down at all, and don’t normally fold on me. They’re not hard to get on and off. I wear thongs since the seam of normal underwear can be seen, and unless I do a laser cut or “no seam” thong, I can see the faint outline of the top still, so I personally don’t wear these leggings with very cropped things. I also do darker colors because I am a little self conscious about how lighter colors don’t hide my extra “contours” with the shine of leggings as much as the darker colors, but I feel actually sexy and athletic in these. Just wearing these around the house gives me a confidence boost, and also a boost of encouragement to go to the gym. I’m not self conscious of my booty but my booty does look extra great in this lol. Read more Read more

reviews.body: These are amazing, super soft, super comfortable, ordered two pairs and will order more.

reviews.body: Ich habe schon viele Leggings ausprobiert, aber keine hat mich so begeistert wie die CRZ YOGA Butterluxe Damen High Waist Sport Leggings. Hier sind weitere Gründe, warum diese Leggings einfach so unschlagbar ist: • Unvergleichlicher Komfort: Die Butterluxe-Stoffqualität ist einfach unvergleichlich. Die Leggings fühlt sich unglaublich weich und angenehm auf der Haut an – fast wie eine zweite Haut. Man merkt sofort den Unterschied zu anderen Leggings, die ich bisher getragen habe. • Perfekte Passform: Dank des High-Waist-Designs sitzt die Leggings genau richtig und verrutscht nicht. Egal, ob beim Yoga, Laufen oder einfach im Alltag – sie bleibt immer an Ort und Stelle und gibt ein sicheres Gefühl. • Blickdicht: Ein großes Plus ist die Blickdichtheit. Selbst bei intensiven Dehnübungen oder tiefen Kniebeugen bleibt alles bedeckt. Endlich eine Leggings, bei der ich mir keine Sorgen machen muss, dass etwas durchscheint! Read more Read more

name: Owala FreeSip Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle with Straw, BPA-Free Sports Water Bottle, Great for Travel, 24 Oz, Denim
description: The Owala FreeSip Insulated Stainless-Steel Water Bottle with Locking Push-Button Lid easily tackles every thirst. With a built-in, easy-clean straw and a wide-mouth opening, the FreeSip reusable bottle is designed for drinking two different ways: sipping upright through the straw or tilting back to swig from the wide-mouth spout opening. Add in a push-to-open lid and playful colors, and staying hydrated has never been simpler—or more fun. Additional features include double-wall insulated stainless steel that keeps drinks cold up to 24 hours, a carry loop that doubles as a lock, a cup holder-friendly base, and a wide opening for easy cleaning and adding ice. The Owala FreeSip Insulated Stainless-Steel Water Bottle with Locking Push-Button Lid is available in three sizes: 24-Ounce, 32-Ounce, and 40-Ounce. Lid is dishwasher safe; hand wash cup. Not for use with hot liquids. Manufacturer’s limited lifetime warranty.
highlights: 24-ounce insulated stainless-steel water bottle with a FreeSip spout and push-button lid with lock
Patented FreeSip spout designed for either sipping upright through the built-in straw or tilting back to swig from the spout opening
Protective push-to-open lid keeps spout clean; convenient carry loop doubles as a lock
Double-wall insulation keeps drinks cold for up to 24 hours; wide opening for cleaning and adding ice; cup holder-friendly base
BPA, lead, and phthalate-free; hand wash cup, dishwasher-safe lid; not for use with hot liquids

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 27, 2026
reviews.title: Perfect water bottle for my 6-year-old!
reviews.body: I got this for my 6-year-old and it’s been amazing so far. It’s very easy for him to use, and I like that he can sip or use the straw. The bottle keeps his water cold for hours, which is perfect for school and outings. The lid closes securely with a click and hasn’t leaked in his backpack, which I really appreciate. It also opens easily for him without help. It’s sturdy, the size is just right for kids, and the design is really nice. Overall, great quality and definitely worth it!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 31, 2026
reviews.title: Leak-Proof and Super Convenient — One of the Best Water Bottles I’ve Used
reviews.body: I’ve been using the Owala FreeSip 24 oz Water Bottle, and it’s honestly one of the best water bottles I’ve owned. The biggest thing for me is that it’s completely leak-proof. I’ve tossed it in bags, carried it around all day, and never had an issue with spills. That alone makes it worth it. The FreeSip design is also really convenient—you can sip through the built-in straw or tilt it back to drink normally, which I didn’t think I’d care about at first but now really appreciate. It keeps water cold for a long time, and the size is perfect for daily use, travel, or the gym. The build quality feels solid, and the Shy Marshmallow color looks great. Overall, this is a well-designed, reliable water bottle that just works. If you want something durable, leak-proof, and easy to use, this is a great choice. Highly recommended.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 15, 2026
reviews.title: Product does exactly as they advertise! My bottle kept my water cold for 120 hours!
reviews.body: We were traveling on Thursday, April 9 and flew out of Charlotte, NC. I filled my Owala with cold tap water at home and drove 2.5 hours to Charlotte Airport. I chose to leave my Owala in the car, couldn’t take the chance of TSA keeping my Owala. We returned on Monday, April 13. We got in the car and it was very hot inside. I took a sip from my Owala and it was still cold! Not as cold as when we left but cold! Your ad says “stays cold or hot for 25 hours!” You can change that to 120 hours! I love the features of the Owala. The colors are so fun, the straw feature to sip from is awesome or the spout is convenient as well. I love the carry handle and the push button release is excellent! I bought two. One for me and one for myself. We LOVE them and would highly recommend the Owala for anyone who has the desire and an awesome water bottle! Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 13, 2026
reviews.title: A Great water bottle that simply does it all.
reviews.body: I was looking for a new water bottle and saw this product mentioned on a travel blogger video. I have been very impressed with it. Start out with the fact that its just an attractive product. It's shape allows for comfortable carrying. I love that it supports both straw sipping and tip drinking. There are times (like on an airplane) where straw drinking is preferred and times (like at the gym) where I prefer to tip the bottle and drink that way. This bottle seamlessly supports both. And it keeps water cold. The lid doesn't leak, so you could carry it upside down without making a mess. I would highly recommend it.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Great Bottle
reviews.body: Best water bottle!! Love the shape - fits around my hand and design makes for a comfortable grip. I like the choice between the straw and pour spout. Lid stays closed and has easy push button to open. Keeps water cold and ice takes awhile to melt. Plus the choice in colors!!! Highly recommend

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 27, 2026
reviews.title: Great Everyday Bottle with Smart Design and All-Day Insulation
reviews.body: This bottle is the perfect size for everyday use—not too bulky but still holds plenty of water to keep me hydrated throughout the day. One of my favorite features is the sip vs. swig option. It’s so convenient to be able to drink through the straw or take a bigger gulp depending on what I need. It also fits easily in standard cup holders, which makes it great for commuting or traveling. And the insulation is seriously impressive—my drinks stay cold for well over 8 hours, often much longer. Overall, this is a super practical, well-designed bottle that I find myself reaching for every day!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 16, 2026
reviews.title: Very nice color and bottle
reviews.body: The owala is truly wonderful and useful. Contrary to popular belief the Stanley still ties this with 1st place in the “water bottle race”. Seriously I think the Stanley is good for people who are in office jobs or who are staying in one place a lot and the owala is for people who move around at their job and need a water bottle with a top that is secure. An athlete might want an owala to throw in their bag and run with so that they can have the peace of mind knowing that it’s not spilling in their bag. A secretary at a school might want the Stanley because it looks very modern and sharp when sitting on an office desk, and also it has a straw that you can drink out of at work when your thirsty. I personally have both the Stanley and the owala, and I use the both interchangeably whenever I need each one. If I’m taking a trip I take the owala, if I’m sitting at home or in an office I use the Stanley.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026
reviews.title: Best water bottle on the market
reviews.body: Owala water bottles are my favorite. I've had mine for 2 years now. Just bought this one for my 8 year old daughter. Love the dual option for sipping with straw or gulping. I've dropped mine and banged it up. I do have a few dents in the bottom of it but the paint has stayed in tact. It is very durable and easy to carry around with the handle. Some handles break quick but this one has no issues. I have the 24 oz which is a perfect size for me, fits in the car cup holder. I don't drink my water with ice but my daughter does and the ice will hold for several hours before melting.

name: STANLEY Quencher H2.0 Tumbler with Handle and Straw 30 oz | Flowstate 3-Position Lid | Cup Holder Compatible for Travel | Insulated Stainless Steel Cup | BPA-Free | Nectarine
description: This Quencher H2.0 is generously sized (but not oversized) with an easy-carry, comfort-grip handle and a narrow base that will fit most cup holders. Long day of meetings? Rowing class? Trip out of town? Our durable 30 oz tumbler, made with recycled stainless steel, is up to the hydration challenge. The double-wall vacuum insulation will keep your water cold for 9 hours and iced for 40 hours. And to cap things off, there’s an advanced FlowState™ lid that features a rotating cover with three positions: a straw opening designed to resist splashes with a seal that holds the reusable straw in place, a drink opening, and a full-cover top.
highlights: YOUR DREAM TUMBLER: Whichever way your day flows, the H2.0 FlowState tumbler keeps you refreshed with fewer refills. Double wall vacuum insulation means drinks stay cold, iced or hot for hours. Choose between our 14oz, 20oz, 30oz,40oz and 64oz options depending on your hydration needs. The narrow base on all sizes (except 64oz) fits just about any car cup holder, keeping it right by your side.

ADVANCED LID CONSTRUCTION: Whether you prefer small sips or maximum thirst quenching, Stanley has developed an advanced FlowState lid, featuring a rotating cover with three positions: a straw opening designed to resist splashes with a seal that holds the reusable straw in place, a drink opening, and a full-cover top for added leak resistance. We’ve also included an ergonomic, comfort-grip handle, so you can easily carry your ice-cold water to work, meetings, the gym or trips out of town.

EARTH-FRIENDLY DURABILITY: Constructed of 90% recycled BPA free stainless steel for sustainable sipping, the Stanley Quencher H2.0 has the durability to stand up to a lifetime of use. Eliminate the use of single-use plastic bottles and straws with a travel tumbler built with sustainability in mind.

DISHWASHER SAFE: Spend less time hunched over the sink and more time doing the things you love. Cleaning your tumbler and lid couldn't be easier, just pop them into the dishwasher. Unlike plastic bottles that retain stains & smells, this metallic beauty comes out pristine

LIFETIME WARRANTY: Since 1913 we’ve promised to provide rugged, capable gear for food and drink - accessories built to last a lifetime. It’s a promise we still keep. Stanley products purchased from Stanley Resellers come with a lifetime warranty. Rest easy knowing we’ve got your back through it all.

reviews.reviewer: Duct Tape Yeti The Elusive One
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on June 29, 2024
reviews.title: I see why the ladies go crazy for these 😂
reviews.body: Bought this for my daughter as a ten year olds birthday request. She wanted pink or purple in 32 or 40oz that’s it but being me, I figure she needed some stuff to go with it 😆! It was $45 for the 40oz Peony Pink color. I thought the lilac was also gorgeous but this pink stood out so strongly and in stores they only carry the hot pink 40oz that has an orange logo on it. I don’t think it’s as attractive as the one o bought and I don’t think she enjoys orange either. It’s sturdy and sleek and comfortable in the hands. The screws were standing out so heavily as fine quality upon notice. No scratches or scuff. Super clean. No Oder!!! Thank God!!! I hate strong oders. It does have gaps where you can easily see it’ll leak if it’s full and you tip it over but being the dad that I am i bought the stoppers as well and they fit so snug. Could still leak but it’s not supposed to be upside down so like… who cares? And seriously you really have to work hard at getting it in a position that causes it to leak. The stoppers I bought for snuggly so I’m very satisfied with the leak stoppers I bought on Amazon, I left a video of the before and after installing them in the other sellers review section. I would know how to link this one to that one but hope you find it and that it helps. But if you don’t buy the stoppers, Honestly get over it nothing is literally perfect except Jesus so just enjoy the cup, it’s phenomenal even without the stoppers. The stainless steel or titanium is what it actually looks like is superb by the look and the feel!!! The pink paint is gorgeous!!! Taylor Swift probably made that song about this Stanley 🤷🏾‍♂️ I seriously wouldn’t be surprised. I have no cons for you honestly. It’s a wonderful buy and I get it now why she wanted one and why my girl friend also desires a Stanley. I really questioned why that brand of all brands like it’s just a cup, like it’s not that serious?! 🧐 but low and behold! Boy! It is that serious and for the price amazing and again, I could not find this color anywhere in the real world. So thanks Amazon! Thanks to the seller and thank you Jesus we have the internet and apps that make life easier for everyday day citizens like you dear reader who took the time out to read my long winded commentaries 😂. Hope this and the pics and videos help you making your decision. I’m fully intending to buy one for myself in some bold manly color if I can find one. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2026
reviews.title: Great water cup
reviews.body: Love this water cup! I like to use it around the house. I like how much water it holds, because I drink a lot of water. The color selection of these cups is really good too; I went with the peony cup. It is very vibrant and bold in color. I would say as for on the go, they can get pretty heavy if walking with it full of water, so maybe not the best choice if you are travelling by foot and carrying it. One thing I will say is that this keeps the water VERY cold for a long period of time! Definitely good in that aspect. The handle is very pleasant to hold too, as it has a soft silicon-like material along the handle, and feels very sturdy and thick. I do wish that the straw was more clear, but that isnt too hard to replace. If you want a water cup for around the house, I would reccommend

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2026
reviews.title: Great purchase
reviews.body: I was a Stanley skeptic. I couldn’t understand what the big deal was or why the internet was freaking out. I saw the video of the Stanley cup surviving the car fire (and I think the ice was still inside). So I tried it. I drink SO much more water now! I love decorating my Stanley with all the fun accessories and it holds a nice amount of water. It feels durable and good quality. I’ve had my Stanley for a year now and I’m even considering getting another so I can have one while the other is being washed. They are easy to clean as well because of the metal inside. There are two issues I’ve had since I got the Stanley cup. Once it was dropped, and the lid broke. Easy to buy more so not the biggest issue. The cup survived the fall just fine, not a mark on it. The other issue I keep having is my lid gets stuck and becomes hard for me to open sometimes. I have a bad thumb and wrist so often I have to have my spouse open it for me. It keeps my water cold all day. If I put ice in before I go to sleep it’s still cold in the morning. I love these cups and would recommend them to anyone looking to drink more water. If you like your water bottle you will drink more water and want to bring it with you. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 23, 2026
reviews.title: Excellent quality, Berdie, NE
reviews.body: Just the right size, not too big for walking & fits perfectly in my cup holder! I don’t like a big insulated tumbler though. Easy to clean. I hand wash it in a few minutes. Water tastes good, leak resistant & keeps ice water for hrs. I usually just drink water from my tap because I have a water filter system but I’d imagine that since it didn’t have a smell or odor to it that any water you’re used to drinking would taste the same. I’m glad I purchased this 20oz insulated drinking mug/ tumbler! Great value!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026
reviews.title: Big, Cold, and Worth It!
reviews.body: Amazon has been on point with every product ! This Stanley is amazing I bought it for my husbands Easter basket and it’s cute I’ve carried my old Stanley with water everywhere I go and been wanting a bigger one I like that it maintains the water cold it’s definitely worth it the color is nice we’ve knocked it over and there’s no leaks besides the one two drops from the straw of course , it lasts all day I’ve carried it to the zoo , park, work and flea market . I’ve been using the Quencher daily and It keeps water ice-cold for hours, even overnight. The large capacity means fewer refills, which I love. The handle is sturdy and comfortable, and despite the size, it’s still easy to carry around. Great for staying hydrated all day!”

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 26, 2025
reviews.title: Good Cup - Lacking Accessories\Options for The Price Paid
reviews.body: For what you are paying, I expect this to come with multiple lids of different styles. I have an Iron Flask (stanley knock off) cup that has like 3 different lids that they threw in as included. This is important, since the Stanley cup's lid is not ambidextrous! the lid has the straw nearer to the edge, so when you screw the lid in, you have to be careful to align it to how you will carry the cup.... if you switch hands during the day, you wont be able to with the stanley cup as easily because the straw is pointed away from you! Its annoying.... This can be easily solved by making the straw come through the CENTER like on all the other cups you have ever bought. Then its a non problem. the Iron flask does this. But aside from that, its a good quality product, keeps drinks cold for a very long time. And a very good design element that this has is that the lip of the cup is polished stainless steel... this is an improvement over the iron flask and other competitors since those cups have PAINT leading up to the lid and over time the paint chips off! POSSIBLY in your water! This happened to me on my worn iron flask cup. I fear I may have drank small chips of black paint for the months ive used it. Very concerning indeed. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2026
reviews.title: A great waterbottle!
reviews.body: I've been looking for a new water bottle for a while now, and I saw people raving about the HydroJug bottle, so I got myself one. I only ordered it a week ago, but so far, I love it! I love how big it is, but I also appreciate that it would fit in a cup holder if needed. The pattern is adorable and seems to be printed on well, so I don't have to worry too much about it fading off or something. It seems really durable, but I'm hoping that I won't need to find out if it can withstand something like falling on the ground! 😅 I like that it's leak-proof but also has a flip straw, so I can flip it down if I need to, so it won't get in the way. It seems easy to disassemble for cleaning, too, which is important to me because I want to be able to wash it regularly. So, you're getting a cute water bottle for a good price, and it's still a great water bottle overall!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 4, 2026
reviews.title: Better Than Stanley
reviews.body: This water bottle is probably the best thing you can buy! My water stays cold through out the day and ice will stay over night and into mid day. I love the lid design. Having the straw fold down really helps with just throwing it in my bag and not worrying about it spilling. The quality of the lid, straw, and seals are awesome. It doesn't feel cheap. I have dropped it once and you cant even tell. The last water bottle I had, when I dropped it, the handle fell off. The HydroJug took it like a champ and is still kicking. I couldn't recommend this bottle enough.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2026
reviews.title: HydroYES!
reviews.body: I purchased this tumbler after losing my favorite Stanley cup, and I was specifically looking for something that was both stylish and truly leak-proof. I prefer tumblers over traditional water bottles, but I have always struggled with leaks, even after adding different lids and accessories to my Stanley and Hydro Flask tumblers. After using this HydroJug tumbler, I can say it has been a great replacement. The biggest selling point for me is that it is actually leak-proof when closed correctly. I did have a couple of moments at first where I did not fully secure the lid and experienced minor leaking, so it is important to double-check that it is properly sealed. Once you get used to that, it works very well and gives me confidence to carry it around without worrying about spills. The straw is another highlight. It is very comfortable to drink from and does not feel restrictive like some other tumblers I have tried. It makes it easy to stay hydrated throughout the day. I chose the 32 oz size, which fits in most standard cup holders. This makes it very convenient for commuting and everyday use. The insulation is also excellent. My water stays cold for hours, even when I am out for long periods of time. Overall, this tumbler meets all of my expectations. It combines the look I prefer with reliable performance, and it does not require extra accessories to function properly. I am very satisfied with this purchase and plan to buy the 40 oz version as well. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026
reviews.title: The Best Water Bottles!
reviews.body: My favorite water bottle by far! I've tried a lot of water bottles in my life, and it's safe to say this one takes the cake! Not only do they have a variety of cute colors/patterns to choose from, but they are totally leak-proof! I just recently purchased the pink one, but I have others and plan on purchasing more in the future to replace all of my other water bottles (Stanley and Hydroflasks in particular). The quality is amazing, it's affordable, and it keeps my water cold all day long! What more could you ask for from a water bottle!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 11, 2026
reviews.title: Great cup
reviews.body: Love love love this cup. No spill EVER is awesome! 40 oz makes measuring your water intake so easy, love the big handle! Love how the cap screws on and straw is always where you want its direction. Also like that it can fit into the car cup holder! All my family has many Yeti’s but we now are collecting the HydroJug Traveler! Great design and keeps the temperature of water right how you want it! This is a big WIN!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 18, 2026
reviews.title: No regrets!
reviews.body: I originally ordered a 40 oz tumbler from another popular brand (starts with a B), but I didn’t like the exposed silicone straw. It doesn’t fold down and easily collects dust, lint, and hair. I also didn’t want to buy a separate cap just to cover it. That felt unnecessary. So I canceled that order and bought the HydroJug Traveler instead. This bottle is ready to use straight out of the box. No extra accessories needed. The construction feels sturdy right away, especially the handle, which is secured with a screw instead of just molded plastic. The finish is smooth and sleek. The straw folds down and is made of hard plastic, which feels more durable, is easier to clean, and doesn’t snag on things. I hand washed it with warm water and dish soap, then rinsed thoroughly. The lid unscrews easily and the straw is removable, which makes cleaning simple. After washing, I filled it with cold water and ice. So far, it keeps the water ice cold and the ice hasn’t melted quickly. There’s no metallic or chemical taste. The water tastes clean. It also doesn’t make loud slurping noises when drinking. I tested it for leaks by holding it upside down over the sink and shaking it. No leaks at all. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 26, 2026
reviews.title: Not just another emotional support water bottle
reviews.body: When I first saw this, I thought “do I really need another emotional support water bottle?”. I have multiple Stanley dupes, and a few owalas, but I couldn’t get over the color. So I purchased for myself as an early Mother’s Day gift. Boy am I glad I did! It’s truly water tight and spill proof. I love that I can just throw it in my purse or work bag and not worry about it ruining the contents of my bag! It is a little tedious to clean but it’s a small price I’m willing to pay for such a great water bottle

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 14, 2026
reviews.title: Stylish, Durable 32 oz Bottle That’s Great for Everyday Hydration
reviews.body: I’ve been using the HydroJug Traveler 32 oz water bottle daily, and it’s quickly become my go-to for staying hydrated. It’s designed to hold a full 32 ounces while still fitting in most standard cup holders, and it actually does, which makes it perfect for commuting, errands, or the gym. The handle is sturdy and comfortable to carry, and the flip straw lid makes it easy to drink from without spilling. It feels durable and well-made, and the insulation keeps my water cold for hours, even when I leave it in the car. I also appreciate that it doesn’t sweat on the outside. One small thing to note: because it’s insulated and solidly built, it’s a little heavier than a basic plastic bottle but that’s expected with this style. Overall, it’s functional, cute, and practical for everyday use. If you’re looking for a reliable insulated bottle that’s easy to carry and cup-holder friendly, this is a great option.

name: bella 2 Slice Slim Toaster, Fits-anywhere™ Kitchenware, 6 Setting Shade Control with Reheat & Cancel Buttons, Fits sourdough, 10” Long Slot, Anti Jam & Auto Shutoff, 900 Watt, Oatmilk
description: Introducing the bella 2-Slice Slim Toaster, where innovative design meets ultimate functionality. With a unique 10-inch long slot, this bagel toaster effortlessly accommodates two slices of square bread side by side or a variety of artisanal breads, sourdough, bagels, baguettes, and thick Texas-style toast. The wide toasting space and slim 3.58" profile make it a perfect fit for any kitchen, combining versatility with space-saving efficiency. Control your toast exactly the way you like it with the 6-setting shade selector, plus Reheat and Cancel functions for precise browning. The high lift lever ensures easy access to smaller items like English muffins, while the auto-centering guides keep everything perfectly aligned for even toasting every time. Cleaning this toastie maker is a breeze with the removable slide-out crumb tray, and the anti-jam and auto shut off features provide added safety and peace of mind. Powered by a 900-watt toasting system, this toaster delivers quick and consistent results. Available in five stylish bella colors—Oatmilk, Surf, Plum, Seaglass, and Blossom—the long slot toaster is a modern, practical addition to any kitchen, offering both functionality and aesthetic appeal.
highlights: Slim Design, Big Impact: With a sleek 3.58" profile, the bella 2-Slice Slim Toaster fits comfortably on any countertop without taking up much space. Part of our Fits-anywhere kitchenware collection, it’s the perfect blend of style and practicality

One Long Slot for Versatile Toasting: The extra-wide, 10-inch long slot accommodates two slices of bread side by side or thick artisan breads like bagels, baguettes, and Texas-style toasts. No more squeezing or cutting—just perfect toast, every time

Toasted Perfection: Six shade settings with a convenient cancel function allow you to customize your bread to your exact preference, from lightly golden to dark and crispy. Achieve your ideal toast with just a simple turn of the dial

Easy Cleanup & Clutter-Free Countertop: The removable crumb tray slides out for quick cleaning, ensuring your smart toaster stays tidy and operates efficiently. Plus, the cord wrap feature keeps your countertop neat and free from tangled cords

Effortless Access: Retrieving smaller slices like English muffins is a breeze with the high-lift lever, giving you easy access without burning your fingers. It’s thoughtful details like these that make this appliance a must-have for every kitchen

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Love It – Perfect Slim Toaster!
reviews.body: I absolutely love this Bella 2 Slice Slim Toaster! Its sleek, slim design truly fits anywhere and doesn’t take up much counter space, which is perfect for my kitchen. Despite its compact size, it toasts evenly and fits my bread with no issues. The 6-setting shade control is great—I can get my toast exactly how I like it, from lightly toasted to perfectly crispy. The reheat function is also super convenient and works really well without over-toasting. It looks modern, works efficiently, and is easy to use. Great quality for the price. I’m very happy with this purchase and would definitely recommend it!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 17, 2026
reviews.title: Great price, works well, looks good
reviews.body: After about 20 years, our big-brand toaster broker. Most of the big-brand models cost over $100, and many over $200. That felt ridiculous for a device that basically just heats up coils. My spouse and I decided to try the Bella and it's great. At the time of this review, it cost $35. We got the 4 slice Oatmeal colored one. Looks great in our kitchen and pretty much works just like our old one. A few notes for those that are interested: - Has no bell to indicate it's done. That didn't bother us - especially if the other person is sleeping. - No digital display. The temp control is an old school knob that articulates very nicely. It took us a moment to get used to this because from a distance with our old toaster, we could see the temp setting and make corrections if we forgot to set it how we like it. Easy adjustment for us to make. - It has a removable crumb tray. This is important to us because we beat our toasters up by putting all kinds of foods into it which sends crumbles to the bottom all the time. - It doesn't have a "lift to look" feature...we kind of miss that but it's an easy adjustment for us to make. - Looks great - we do like having a little style / design in our kitchen. It looks like an up-scale product. Read more Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 13, 2026
reviews.title: erfect Slim Toaster for RV Life – Fits Anywhere and Works Great
reviews.body: erfect Slim Toaster for RV Life – Fits Anywhere and Works Great This Bella 2-slice slim toaster is an absolute perfect fit for RV use and earns every bit of 5 stars. The slim, fits-anywhere design is exactly what you need in an RV where counter space is at a premium—it tucks away easily without taking up valuable workspace, and the oatmilk finish looks clean and modern in the kitchen area. The 10-inch long slot handles a variety of bread sizes without any issues, and the 6 shade settings give enough control to get toast exactly the way you like it every time. The reheat and cancel buttons are convenient everyday touches, and the auto shutoff gives peace of mind in a small RV kitchen where you don't want to leave anything unattended. The removable crumb tray makes cleanup quick and easy—an important feature in an RV where keeping things tidy in a small space matters. At 900 watts it toasts efficiently without being a heavy draw on the power system, which is a practical consideration for RV electrical loads. If you're looking for a compact, reliable, great-looking toaster that fits perfectly in an RV kitchen without compromise, this Bella slim toaster is exactly the right choice. Highly recommended.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 31, 2026

reviews.body: First off: the color "oatmilk" appears to be lavender in the photos, it isn't. It really is close to the color of oatmilk. The slim profile gives us more countertop room and the outer walls of the toaster stay cool to the touch. It's quite efficient at toasting too. Very happy with this purchase and will probably get a couple for gifts.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 28, 2026
reviews.title: Sleek design, works great, and perfect for small spaces
reviews.body: I really like this toaster — the slim design is honestly one of its best features. It doesn’t take up much counter space at all, which is perfect if you have a smaller kitchen or just want a cleaner setup. Performance-wise, it does exactly what you’d want. The 6 shade settings actually make a noticeable difference, so you can get your toast just how you like it. It toasts evenly on both sides, and I haven’t had any issues with uneven browning or needing to run it twice. The reheat function is also a nice bonus and works well for warming things back up without over-toasting them. It feels solid overall and not cheap, and the controls are simple and easy to use. If I had to point out one small thing, it’s that like most slim toasters, it’s better suited for standard bread slices rather than really thick artisan bread — but that’s expected with this style. Overall, great toaster for the price and especially ideal if you’re short on space but still want something reliable and good-looking.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 22, 2026
reviews.title: Great space-saving design, slight learning curve
reviews.body: I really like the slim design—it’s perfect for saving space in a compact kitchen. It fits nicely on the counter without taking up too much room, and the long slot is great for different types of bread like sourdough. The only downside is that it can be a little tricky at first to find the right setting for your preferred toasting level. It takes a bit of trial and error. Once you figure it out though, it works well and does the job. Overall, a good toaster with a smart, space-saving design.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 22, 2026
reviews.title: cute and works great
reviews.body: I love it! It has a clean and elegant look. The slim design is perfect for our small space. It functions smoothly and is very pleasant to use. I want to keep toasting things haha! It toasts well (not perfectly even, but idc so much about that), and fits two pieces of toast or waffles side by side (I haven't tried bagels yet). Great value for the cost. Seems like it should hold up for a while, but only time will tell.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 2, 2026
reviews.title: Nice design, good cleanup
reviews.body: When I got it I wondered if the material was cheap - but it turned out to be pretty reliable. Looks great on the counter, has a convenient bread crumb latch that slides out and does not require you to tilt the toaster. The heat might be a bit strong - so better to get the settings right on the first toast rather than go back again. Love the sleek design as it saves space on the counter. Good value for the price and the fact that you can register the device with the brand’s site is a nice touch.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Canada on April 29, 2026
reviews.title: Super cute toaster that works well!
reviews.body: This toaster is so cute, I absolutely love the colour! It’s longer than I imagined but it fits perfectly between my microwave and air fryer. It easily fits extra long sourdough slices and toasts well. If you tuck the cord properly in the little clip/slot on the bottom there’s no issues with balance. Make sure to run the toaster a few times with nothing in it to burn off the manufacturing residue, it will have a chemical smell the first few times you use it. Overall, I’m super happy with this toaster and I think it’s a great price for a nice quality appliance.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Canada on February 27, 2026

reviews.body: Excellent toaster. Does a premium job of heating evenly and consistently to your setting. Controls are simple and easy to use, ....the illuminated 'cancel' button is a good feature, especially when you are half asleep. The heating dial is precise and easy to adjust. The colour is matt and perfect tone, and the brand label is discreet. Easy to clean, and the crumb tray is simple and very effective. Have been using this toaster for 4 months and it works great, very consistent and fast. The shape and the space saving is very useful ....I only use artisan bread and have a smaller kitchen with two people, and this toaster fits perfectly. Well designed quality product. I have been using regular toasters for over 50 years ....and this is way better.

All my different bottles of cooking oils except for my jug of peanut oil came in dark bottles instead of clear ones, probably for a good reason. I use it for everything from grilling meat to checking baked goods, and it has been consistently accurate and dependable. It feels solid in your hand and doesn’t have that flimsy feeling some kitchen thermometers have.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 31, 2025
reviews.title: Great for Cold & Iced Liquids
reviews.body: 4 stars — great for cold and especially iced liquids; poor for hot. No spillage at all. Would buy again. I recently tested a variety of tumblers with a digital thermometer, in a variety of conditions. Two important findings: (1) The best predictor of temperature after 3 or 24 hours was the tumbler's volume, not the brand or design — if you can stuff it with more ice, it will stay colder, longer. (2) The differences were too small to matter, in my opinion. After 3 hours, there was barely a 1-2°F among the tumblers. Even after 24 hours, the spread was under 6°F. Each retained Ice & Heat for long enough periods that I could prepare the night before. Accordingly, I chose based on design, ease of cleaning, and flavor. I was surprised that the Owala ended up the best for sipping cold liquids. Despite having a tiny opening to drink from, it never gets blocked by ice (crushed, cubed, or otherwise). It also hasn't gotten blocked by boba or passion fruit seeds or anything else I've had in the cup. Read more Read more

As much as I liked the similar-sized Corksicle “wine tumbler”, two spills on my clothes while carrying it prompted me to search for and find this Owala. ~Its matte texture is both nice-looking and feeling. reviews.title: Love these for easy table centerpieces
reviews.body: I love these cheesecloth table runners. I purchased the white, yellow, black and red and all of them are great! They quickly dress up a table for any type of event. It’s easy to use these and incorporate other small items such as confetti or picture frames or cutouts. These are all good quality and fit a 6 foot table perfectly. The white still covered the table well and wasn’t completely transparent. These are easy to wash between uses. You can reuse these over and over again.
